subject: The TRUTH will always prevail

body:
Hunter Biden's laptop

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=1ccb6f0eeac34ca2a5e39ae65f31b41d&_e=eEKw1SmkSfzBDUp45FmdQHd-jMfqyXI9K7cU60VW5Kt-cVBVmLYkdTQ-siQPakYOKOI3uopgNWigduVGjlf47ySvWK_dq7eT899O-TQwPLODs4hwAJjIxQb_nnQnnk0NdgPeXTYfFaqCSKPfuq5PYw2GpQLR_HvVt5niyfMqGaWqyFjrfOhvxw92fXBS9IXzaE1qs9s5dTY6hUjWg6MIz-4-RM6OM10RqbBHfzXxXcP9GaxnoNEGQzCGaSXIH9_FhRI3fF1EJZHgzT4ERrS6xC0_GbvP08OeaZ8ZPZYYjhkmgaTCy2Gg5C9BmeY6HM2DRnntVCFcM9bC3CJftpt1KrUUMVZE8sZXp8gKgDFsTxndTUn_mSVQ-xwWTlUDpF6RvOl9HN2hiQaXKQAxQQSJcUV9WhGS0tnb716fnFz_Sd97FXYwWMXCuzF5UkcUfm1fqLj8hINOUYts706rLlI7-g%3D%3D)

Friends,

The Hunter Biden laptop story was one of the biggest October surprises in presidential history. Now, thanks to the latest revelations, it's clear Big Tech companies censored information. That's why I am as committed as ever to bringing the American people the full, unvarnished truth about Hunter Biden and his foreign business dealings.

**Democrats and the media demonized our investigation, smearing it as "Russian Disinformation."
**
We now know they were the ones peddling disinformation. The American people deserve the **TRUTH!**

| [**STAND UP FOR THE TRUTH**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=1ccb6f0eeac34ca2a5e39ae65f31b41d&_e=eEKw1SmkSfzBDUp45FmdQHd-jMfqyXI9K7cU60VW5Kt-cVBVmLYkdTQ-siQPakYOKOI3uopgNWigduVGjlf47ySvWK_dq7eT899O-TQwPLODs4hwAJjIxQb_nnQnnk0NdgPeXTYfFaqCSKPfuq5PYw2GpQLR_HvVt5niyfMqGaWqyFjrfOhvxw92fXBS9IXzaE1qs9s5dTY6hUjWg6MIz-4-RM6OM10RqbBHfzXxXcP9GaxnoNEGQzCGaSXIH9_FhRI3fF1EJZHgzT4ERrS6xC0_GbvP08OeaZ8ZPZYYjhkmgaTCy2Gg5C9BmeY6HM2DvjC3e1S9m5M774kza3Dsx3Y9-irxTfOoy6XsHfmWbNKxFHYyBVQZFzFTnu_U0dapl6lNwc3FDSx2KqPM7gfKHuZCB8SQEbEaw9vXT0mFb_tgL_UJLSJP0ZG2m3WaNqcEDXDmxhU9k0_ysrXWKqTYeg%3D%3D)
---

Elon Musk's recent report showed the FBI was talking to social media platforms to influence information being posted on their platforms for public consumption. I'm working as hard as ever to protect and uphold your First Amendment rights.

I won't stop fighting to get to the bottom of this mess. **[Would you be willing to chip in anything you can to help Republicans hold the government accountable?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=1ccb6f0eeac34ca2a5e39ae65f31b41d&_e=eEKw1SmkSfzBDUp45FmdQHd-jMfqyXI9K7cU60VW5Kt-cVBVmLYkdTQ-siQPakYOKOI3uopgNWigduVGjlf47ySvWK_dq7eT899O-TQwPLODs4hwAJjIxQb_nnQnnk0NdgPeXTYfFaqCSKPfuq5PYw2GpQLR_HvVt5niyfMqGaWqyFjrfOhvxw92fXBS9IXzaE1qs9s5dTY6hUjWg6MIz-4-RM6OM10RqbBHfzXxXcP9GaxnoNEGQzCGaSXIH9_FhRI3fF1EJZHgzT4ERrS6xC0_GbvP08OeaZ8ZPZYYjhkmgaTCy2Gg5C9BmeY6HM2Dxi02yzey4q50424uGTyl92_Un0RLZGa8qYAUThHGm9XoMnDsl_Ul1aHesj6IT3QthD3lzvUDiwzeQdFj5aIgrhJHbUBiZ9qWCRmywxxg6wkmeCVey6eoEyGFECehYpCRSseWDgo3LjR4N9eRV10CdQ%3D%3D)**

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: January special elections →
body:
We need to mobilize right now, so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections. | | |
---
| | This year, state Democrats notched key victories in ultra-competitive states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Minnesota that led to flipping chambers across the nation. Now, FIVE special election battles are on the books for January – and we’re running out of time to ensure our state Democrats have the support they need! Just _look_ at the races happening next month: | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
1/3 | Georgia | HD-7
1/10 | Virginia | HD-35
1/10 | Virginia | SD-7
1/10 | Mississippi | HD-23
1/31 | Pennsylvania | SD-27
These races are important opportunities for Democrats – **Virginians will be heading back to the polls next November for Election Day, so victories in some of these upcoming special elections could set the tone for 2023 and beyond.**
But that means we need to mobilize _right now,_ so we can compete against Republican spending in these critical special elections.
[With just weeks to go before the first special election of 2023, will you rush a donation of $7, $25 or anything you can spare today to help state Democrats WIN in tough races like these across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_T2zyTQu244Uf_Vel4qq1wxdfmheLTDcuAKS7BB9YfgYRzByiPyavCOi5_Hl9DJ6nO4nyikw_d-a6HvbC6bVFqd5CuSZRZKh67WvM61OcfWfnojvgNPgxRlXAnFF0W1GtNKpCg_0c3xXcNzM6fluduqBN7sdw1bCRThY4fGIfIHmNthLCA5YAsQBi8B0VpiELEHXQ3mb96RySF0xsYVirXNvRgoHSi8-jpn1_Vl01XcItM3DDUxItcCNeVCC65JQtrBvQ1X0mMIKkDxJ0cPhJ98X_7ydN9Op26yWyh2rCbWZVE3EnSZeppuL78Lt3LnYgll-ysZ56dkRwXsxP-48GFB4IUrLEmk6_g5yAOaz0lJNvsignlcxzyytfZQUenS0oRCk9zmDuUn9anuGp09-e/3ry/jvrQN3jURqyGmyz295vsnA/h0/cQ_f2yOviYXZ8noASiT0VR0Ptc7lUrcMy2noB3vMMBY)

clean_body: One more goal for the year | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD I have 4 words for you: End of year goal. We only have a couple of weeks before the end of the year, and we need to ensure we have the funds to hit the ground running next year when I 'm in the Senate. As such, my team has unlocked a special offer for our top supporters like you: | Reaching our goals is the only way to hold the Radical Left accountable, especially since we are outnumbered in the Senate. We have to hit the ground running as soon as possible in 2023 to ensure we put up a fight against the Democrats. - When I take the floor and vote in the U.S. Senate next year, I want to know that YOU have my back. Sincerely, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Helping students succeed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Last week Katie introduced legislation to help schools provide no-cost meals to students without forcing parents to spend hours filling out paperwork.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15546%2E3422442%2EUTYVW_)
Last week Katie introduced legislation to help schools provide no-cost meals to students _without_ forcing parents to spend hours filling out paperwork.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-no-cost-meals/?source=EMAE12_NCL_20221212_V1_F&t=2&akid=15546%2E3422442%2EUTYVW_)
The _No Kids Hungry in Schools Act_ is an investment in our entire future. Right now, complicated and time-consuming paperwork is a **barrier for serving lunch to some of the most at-need students, and it’s an added administrative burden for schools.**
As a parent of three kids, Katie knows how important it is that no kid goes hungry at school. We’d love your support! **[Sign on to show your support for no-cost lunches.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-no-cost-meals/?source=EMAE12_NCL_20221212_V1_F&t=3&akid=15546%2E3422442%2EUTYVW_)**

**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE12_NCL_20221212_V1_F&t=5&akid=15546%2E3422442%2EUTYVW_)**
Team KP

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ8GbiD_gE0PHNqiNGqrSL1Eyina2Ca4sjExJihvX0ObHiKt9vDNzFoeVWPGUfXEKk5TWQODVslU1wQRggmmiCCMUY4qWvGiknBiFZSnKimQsqBNDngG752zuXA27WreIsEwLloAjKnAFeaMQVEQaAuqcJuaugthGBP6nJBNnNYrJZ2dIYgu9-p6jYciFtAL5bPgFQSr-pA5m9DNFOxxdJMXKqHN7En2aEsIWzxWST3FQBNTv0SAHUCf-zsD66Zopw0p7w7XB7WiXphse_najuV-f13kY2-0jMID7LSM_2iMfZ8kmlXqaznM2hg9Mh4LOq8FLbXEt41ub3XCXxJC1hghawPkcpitn77tx1v2edhlF7az5SKS17jDbVD_zr8j-dr7QnnzA6w9jHs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkMFugzAQRL8GbiB7DcY5cGiLUqmtck8v0cY2wZENxDFB-fsa2vQQabWHNzNreXRNeUXEhouKpapGjq1WqamBAFCgjAChlOREMFEVQuGRCyyPIimIdmhsjnRG74fB5XJwaVcrDuK4oaUA5EVVMNlCRbEtjoph2TJIbd2FMF4T9pLANk7rtVaDmzHILvf6douHIpbYS-2z4DUGp_uQDS5h2ym4w3WYvNQJa2YP2bMtAb54nFZmioEmpn6JRDeiOfUPhm6Yop01UD4cQx_0inppM2z73bn5vjevUT701qgoPMHOqPiPxrqPSZFZp75W42ysNVdexYJOa0FLLfFta9p7nVQxCGsMYG0ALvvZ-ensPt-zr_0uu_CdKxcR3uIO91H_O_-O5GvvC62aHwZijP8)

Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between November 16, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on December 31, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) signed Make America Great Again Hat and one (1) certificate of authentication (approximate retail value $40). | | Joe Biden has a long history of screwing over Americans.

It started in **1983, when he voted to slap income taxes on 50% of Social Security** income, income that had previously been tax-free.

In **1994, he voted to up the amount of Social Security benefits subject to taxation, to 85%.**

In **2000, he turned his attention to estate taxes, voting** **AGAINST the Estate Tax Elimination Act** that would have phased out certain estate taxes by 2010.

**Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in taxes... **

And _he's got his eye on America's nest eggs..._

His plan?

He wants to expand estate taxes and "equalize" benefits across tax brackets.

Now that word "equalize"...

It's not the same as "fair"...

"Equalize" means some will come out ahead... while others will end up with less.

What will happen to you?

**What will you LET happen to you?**

It's worth considering.

Are you prepared to accept the worst... the potential for higher taxes, fewer benefits, less money overall for yourself...

Or do you want to do something about it -- BEFORE Joe Biden changes the tax laws?

Right now -- but potentially not for much longer -- there's a unique [IRS loophole that could protect your IRA, 401(k), pension, TSP, or savings account from Joe Biden's "Raw New Deal"](http://trk.libertyledger._tF6yrwKJCeM90DkJ90YQ).

You could protect your money 100% tax- and penalty-free, too. For now.

All the details are laid out for you in this [FREE GUIDE](http://trk.libertyledger._KA) to protecting your wealth and retirement savings.

But you'll want to act fast. Joe Biden has a lot of plans for his "first term" in office.

Don't let his plans ruin yours...

subject: Twitter has been exposed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

Twitter did everything it could to censor me.

Elon Musk's Twitter Files revealed how the woke hooligans at the Big Tech giant were not just content to ban President Trump.

_Leaked conversations show the censors at Twitter plotted to nuke my account_.

_My crime?_

Telling the truth about the FEDSURRECTION on January 6.

The regime in D.C., Big Tech, and the fake news media want to hide the truth about that day.

**That's why Joe Biden, Liz Cheney, and Nancy Pelosi want to hide the nearly 14,000 hours of video footage from the Capitol.** [** ❯❯ RELEASE THE VIDEO ❮❮ **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61258797:WuEPVYDpN:m:1:2365227053:E172E1D05BFEA9FC156F84E7B1DFE4CF:r) The swamp knows releasing that footage will exonerate our patriots.

**And I plan to lead the fight to make that happen when the GOP majority takes power in January.**

**[Will you join me in the fight to expose the truth about the January 6 FEDSURRECTION by chipping in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61258797:WuEPVYDpN:m:1:2365227053:E172E1D05BFEA9FC156F84E7B1DFE4CF:r)?**

You and I now know that Twitter rigged the 2020 Presidential election through selective censorship and hiding the Biden crime family corruption from the voters.

Thanks to Elon Musk and Twitter Files, you and I know that the woke foot soldiers inside Twitter tried to shut down all opposition to the regime by censoring the MAGA movement.

Banning Donald Trump was just the tip of the iceberg.

_I was number two on the censor's hit list_.

Eventually, the free-speech-hating fascists inside Twitter could not find any rules I broke and backed down.

But I will not give one inch in the fight to answer the real questions about January 6.

**_How many FBI informants were in the crowd that day?_**

**_Did these Deep State operatives incite acts of violence?_**

**_Why is the regime hiding hours of January 6 video footage?_**

The January 6 FEDSURRECTION was a setup to destroy the MAGA movement.

And Twitter tried to censor me for flying over the target.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Will You Stay By My Side?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
It’s now more important than ever we Champion American Values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0270%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=URHEP82F1ey2NpVy6%2b7ozg&sysid=1)
It’s now more important than ever we Champion American Values.

| |
---
| | | | |
---

**It’s now more important than ever we Champion American Values** because Joe Biden and the Democrats won't stop destroying America until their radical agenda is completely fulfilled.

They want to:

\- End the filibuster
\- Pack the courts
\- Raise taxes
\- Increase out-of-control-spending

To put it briefly...they want to turn the American dream _into a socialist nightmare!_

That's why I need _**[YOUR continued support](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43598%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ezC%2fqVQXQJp9whYJx2X0iQ&sysid=1 "YOUR continued support")**_ to enable me and our Conservative Cavalry to once again put America FIRST.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43599%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bFCsUX7lOTVw5%2bW4kyFlfw&sysid=1)
---

President Reagan was right: faith, family, and freedom are the pillars of American democracy, but the left continues to attack our values on each of these fronts.

If we don't stop their radical agenda we may lose our country for good.

---
| | [PUT AMERICA FIRST](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43590%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QcViCqtKpmjJDg34ZM6m0Q&sysid=1)
---

That’s why as we head into 2023 and 2024, I’m going to need you to stay by my side \- __**[are you with me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43591%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=42345zex4UtxwbjHy0TmnA&sysid=1 "are you with me?")**__

Your help and support is key, and there is a lot of work to do to champion American values!

Never Give An Inch,

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjg1ptc9cfclt265lg42oomjn7720tmu47nmoqmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z39bu7nnj736e9r6q4fn87hfb4iaachr0t0i0bcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob4cdh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrgsfhvilfghm74c2psumdua3v3rp628dh4fm8ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob4cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv1nh0nro4ipqntqne966uktboiebd5s5b30dlf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z68548gs775kif0u0s7shqs4l9l2ik31g27p5780_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg6ssb6ccdhvvpmpni6bq10hslr4fr1raupabpho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjh69ob2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7jr4ehau1e84i89d1ei3l7ij5fbroq81idq3eig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj68o34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvcnqdf47c72i7blgpojbpaklf355a9su5s5l3lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj68o34c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmn9ph05rne5f9abndi0ftv3j6djkgl4q5b4gak0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj68o34c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9qvu77u7llvff5cq7hb80tj5jgp7degg0vpp50_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj68o34c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Protecting Firearms Freedom
body:
Protecting Our Firearms Freedom by Mark DuBoisBetween 2006 and 2016, Mississippi’s firearms laws were incrementally changed to remove most restrictions on firearms carry and use, so that now citiz | |
---

| | | Protecting Our Firearms Freedom |
---|---|---
| |
---
by Mark DuBois
Between 2006 and 2016, Mississippi’s firearms laws were incrementally changed to remove most restrictions on firearms carry and use, so that now citizens can carry a concealed firearm without a permit to most places in the state. But now that our state laws have finally (mostly) acknowledged our God-given rights as outlined in the U.S. and Mississippi Constitutions, the next battle is against federal laws and their ever-increasing restrictions that affect the purchase or possession of firearms, magazines, ammunition and accessories; and also attempts to keep records of all such purchases.
[Sign the Petition supporting a Firearms Freedom Act](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Petitions/3560/Respond)
The Constitution grants Congress the power “to regulate commerce...among the several states...” Since most firearms, ammunition and accessories that are purchased in one state are manufactured in another state, Congress claims the authority to place numerous restrictions and requirements on the manufacture and sale of those items. In some states, there have been legislative attempts to protect manufacturers and purchasers in their states from these limitations. Montana passed the Montana Firearms Freedom Act in 2009, and was followed by 9 other states enacting similar laws, and a further 23 states (including Mississippi) having bills introduced that didn’t become law. Unfortunately, the 9th Circuit Court of Appeals ruled against the Montana law on the grounds that guns, ammo or accessories manufactured and purchased completely within that state might eventually make their way out of the state. This is a huge overreach from the original intent of the Commerce Clause, but overreach has long been the general pattern of all branches of the federal government. The Supreme Court declined to take the case on appeal, leaving dead the Montana law, and other 9th Circuit states’ laws. But with the conservative shift in the high court since then, and our being under the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals (covering Mississippi, Louisiana and Texas), maybe there’s still hope for this approach.
The latest battle on the firearms freedom front is the implementation of state laws prohibiting local or state law enforcement officers, or other state officials, from enforcing federal laws that are more restrictive than the Second Amendment and their state constitutions allow. Called Second Amendment Preservation Acts (SAPAs), Idaho and Missouri passed versions in 2021. These state SAPAs do not require officials to disobey any federal laws - they simply prohibit them from enforcing the laws. Examples of federal laws or rules/regulations that would be implicated (some anticipated, some already enacted) are so-called “Red Flag Laws” (that could be used to disarm citizens without due process, violating their Fifth Amendment rights), and laws banning some firearms, magazines above certain capacities, and certain accessories.
With Mississippi’s next legislative session beginning early next month, I would encourage all of you to SIGN the Petition asking your elected representatives and senators to protect your firearms rights from the federal government’s overreach by passing a **Firearms Freedom Act** and a **Second Amendment Protection Act**.
[**CLICK Here - Add your name to the Petition**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Petitions/3560/Respond)
* * *

| About the Author |
---|---|---
| Mark DuBois is a Captain for a major airline. He is a life-long resident of Mississippi, graduating from Southaven High School and Mississippi State University, where he earned B.S. and M.S. degrees in Aerospace Engineering. He was commissioned as an officer through Air Force ROTC at MSU and then spent 9 years as an Air Force pilot. He has been married for 34 years to his high school sweetheart, Michele. They have four adult children. |
|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

You are currently subscribed to a mailing list of Mississippi Freedom Caucus. If you wish to unsubscribe, please click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/A5iBmSY7YOkUMfnMf4Dkqg).
[](https://www.votervoice.net)

body:
If the Freedom Convoy taught us anything, it’s this: Those in power will do whatever it takes to stand on the necks of freedo
# **Surprise: US Banks To Start Seizing Accounts?**

If the Freedom Convoy taught us anything, it's this:
Those in power will do _whatever_ it takes to stand on the necks of freedom-loving folks like you and me.
And that includes **seizing your bank accounts without notice.**
I know, most people think 'surprise' bank seizures could never happen in America, but get this:
[**_It 's 100% legal for your bank to seize your checking and savings accounts_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0mdou04rt6dikjr8t0o7o9foof131pijo7m49ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj64o72c9h2bs)** if it falls on hard times.**
It's part of an Obama-era law that lets bankers take down the economy with multi-billion dollar blunders... and then seize **_your_** assets to bail themselves out.
[**_> > Click here now to see if your bank is in on it._**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo3bvjun9jbloov4l917rmsqrmdl7r4vesdhvihg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj64o72c9h2bs)
Now, you might not know about this sneaky law...

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqskuek9t79pala08lfshf3lkrjmhlj826ngfv8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj62or4c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg93kmj2p3gk9kr8qga8e045lttengduic4u6k8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj62or4c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3s5pllgdmheiu5tmq4fie01dgmmu09t57henr4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj62or4c1h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjlhvu7diairpkkd8ukkl2ib49a44vql8jli7t1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj62or4c1h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Financial slavery, brought to you by CBDC
body:
If you thought the COVID lockdowns were terrible, what happens when the government can control how you spend your money during "
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1e9cmjrdtjvha34l14t0m78asvfjhbh89knvifg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)

Friend,

If you thought the COVID lockdowns were terrible, what happens when the government can control how you spend your money during "emergencies?"

President Biden is directing the federal government to explore the idea of a "central bank digital currency" (CBDC), a type of government-issued cryptocurrency.

At first glance, the government getting in on the crypto craze might sound fun, novel, or harmless. But it's cause for serious alarm.

What would happen if the Biden Administration presses forward with efforts to create a so-called "digital dollar?"

Friend, Central Bank Digital Currency will mean slavery.

One reason Bitcoin is so successful is that it is both permissionless -- anyone can use it and can use it how they want -- and decentralized, meaning there's no central authority that can control the currency.

**A government-controlled digital dollar would lose these benefits and give the government****control of your spending and savings.**

My name is Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). We're educating the next generation about the ideas of liberty and free-market economics through our student seminars, teacher training programs, and engaging online videos and articles.

Friend, I've set a goal to raise $10,000 this weekend to fund our **FEE in the Classroom** program. [_**Can you help reach the next generation through a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to donate >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8i9fhnn2e7p7nao5a7v96cop7oi7h5dt7v77o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)

A central bank digital currency is nothing more than a back door to a China-style social credit system. It would allow the government to track _or even restrict_ your purchases.

This would open up new avenues for the government to assert control over our everyday lives.

_**FEE is making sure the next generation doesn 't fall for this in the future.**_

[_**You can support the next generation by sending your gift to FEE here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvjt37pf2gdteu6cl6ijumrhjop4ruveme3j33o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom _uniquely challenges students to think outside the box to challenge the mainstream narrative._**

This unique program is held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country. Our speakers -- acclaimed college professors and successful entrepreneurs -- directly engage students through our educational workshops.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

**FEE in the Classroom demonstrates to the next generation why socialism is a bad idea and establishes a new generation of pro-liberty leaders.**

Can I count on you to bring liberty and free-market economics to classrooms?

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgd7c48q3aqvcf8j033lqvkai0u88fkt4g2gcih8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeqlp046uqvd6puqvr6op7quoir4c06bgjungjm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4caerf7o85ifto6cjhr7vs7d9432uvscjqa4pag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5cup2dm623cvije2soig5ru601hdrhf4a1mr4io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zobslvk2u8mvlqj4767tqhpaovo2mc3k1io3ssg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfh2urvsiaptd6ns9v4f394dsgngtgo0231btvpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zafkdq12kqle132lfoioqptngmhb7be2gaf3puvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

Peter, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**

---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62066528:JXXTdVGNJ:m:1:3253819041:00B7E7BDBD1763F7EE475FCEBB8E4B7F:r) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62066528:JXXTdVGNJ:m:1:3253819041:00B7E7BDBD1763F7EE475FCEBB8E4B7F:r)
---

---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62066528:JXXTdVGNJ:m:1:3253819041:00B7E7BDBD1763F7EE475FCEBB8E4B7F:r)

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Steve Scalise
subject: can I trust you with this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I emailed you a couple times asking for your feedback because I know you're someone I can trust.

Hi Friend. It's Steve Scalise again.
I emailed you a couple times asking for your feedback because I know you're someone I can trust. You might not have seen my messages because I didn't see your response come through yet.
_That 's okay because it's not too late!_
[******I just need to hear back from you by 11:59 PM or I 'll be forced to close down the survey without your response included. This survey will guide our _entire agenda_ in the first weeks of the new Congress, so this is not something to take lightly. Can you please complete my Majority Leader Survey by the end of the day?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5dcsuh81c7snu3mrd8fotmjkocfhe6q12gb3jqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4cdh2bs)
I'm only asking a few short (but important) questions. This survey won't take long -- I promise.
Your help is greatly appreciated!
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_
* * *
**Hi Friend -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[******Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zimgvq4evjid9k2u91flokub69260m4ll4ngjtho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4cdh2bs)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
******[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdntdivgtbfcoitavbe9av31f525b2db97sri1mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4cdh2bs)**
Friend, time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_

body:
5 Answers to Critical Race Theory
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmj7qdcvmlo577v73rvkbqkqja1gaahv6cnq31no_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srge3jmecbicuq75cbhe1oeed30ehp35crjejjbcohhmjij4plkclrm1chi6hrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p70phimapm6pti65j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeo34sphm2p33c8iv0)

| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, Racial tensions have certainly been on the rise in recent years. And unfortunately, it has led to a growing divide in America.

But it doesn't have to be this way.

Many of the arguments made in support of ideas like Critical Race Theory (CRT) ignore reality. They promote victimhood and perpetuate the divide that has already gripped our nation. We all need to push back against these divisive and harmful beliefs.

To better equip you, we've created a new eBook that provides answers to many of the "questions" that those promoting CRT like to use. Please get your copy of _5 Answers to Critical Race Theory.

_ I'm emailing because I really want to make sure that you get your free copy today. [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8h23opjo7cearnvflbumpjj1hag1t6vk3me2go0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4cdh2bs)
__ Inside, you'll learn some of the history and solutions to
* Racial disparities of the wealth gap
* Criminal justice biases
* And housing issues

We also take some time to provide common sense, conservative solutions to many of the issues related to the racial divide in America.

Please be sure to get your free copy of this important eBook right now. I really think you'll find the information valuable. You can access it using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/5-answers-to-crt/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlajuch3qd6ksh3nmkm9kev0ithbegvbdudoji40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj66ob4cdh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcunaug04qa4prhhqk0sqqnsdc9mhdgq6doti9vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj61oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbrqnh5p3ptss79jq7993b85uj8c5v22pb803ngg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj61oj2c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpt5rml4v3lbgdd3sp4j56j0dp25t30rl664lp48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj61oj2c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfj2c7tgpq26e5nra266de4g9usmrsg78dv3jvog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjj61oj2c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

# **[_Voting laws top the agenda as Ohio's lame-duck session resumes_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55893772/383183086/-670457990?refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_ohupdate_Actives&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkOGIyOTcxLWVlN2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bqfh_6dP_nrYr8O1tBgQPonWvTF7NCrY2ohSPuP8Ft4=).**

**Here are some issues to pay attention to in Ohio’s recent news:**
* Lawmakers are threatening to propose a bill that would limit ballot drop boxes to only three days, limit election offices to 88 county boards, shorten the early voting period by a day, and a voter photo ID requirement could be added.
* Lawmakers are hustling through a measure that would make it harder for voters to amend the Ohio Constitution, protecting amendments passed by a gerrymandered legislature.

Sadly, this means lawmakers are imposing barriers to limit voting power of the people. All On The Line is preparing to take action to combat these challenges like these in 2023 and ahead.
Team – this is why we are making a commitment to double down moving forward, **_championing voting accessibility through democracy reform, and organizing volunteers to protect fair maps._** We can’t watch as these corrupt ideals try to manifest as American democracy when we know this is not what our country stands for.
This is why every dollar counts as we begin the next chapter of the fair democracy movement, which includes advocating for voters like Ohioans. [**_Donate right now to help All On The Line put their plan into action._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55893780/383183094/659049697?refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_ohupdate_Actives&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkOGIyOTcxLWVlN2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bqfh_6dP_nrYr8O1tBgQPonWvTF7NCrY2ohSPuP8Ft4=)

– Art Mitchell
Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy

clean_body: Lawmakers are trying to limit voting accessibility. We won’t allow it. | Team, As I was catching up on recent news, I was not surprised to see -- Ohio is once again making news concerning democracy in the Buckeye State. Here are a few recent headlines from the Ohio Capital Journal to check out: = . =. =. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here are some issues to pay attention to in Ohio’s recent news: Lawmakers are threatening to propose a bill that would limit ballot drop boxes to only three days, limit election offices to 88 county boards, shorten the early voting period by a day, and a voter photo ID requirement could be added. Lawmakers are hustling through a measure that would make it harder for voters to amend the Ohio Constitution, protecting amendments passed by a gerrymandered legislature. Sadly, this means lawmakers are imposing barriers to limit voting power of the people. All On The Line is preparing to take action to combat these challenges like these in 2023 and ahead. Team – this is why we are making a commitment to double down moving forward, championing voting accessibility through democracy reform, and organizing volunteers to protect fair maps. We can’t watch as these corrupt ideals try to manifest as American democracy when we know this is not what our country stands for. This is why every dollar counts as we begin the next chapter of the fair democracy movement, which includes advocating for voters like Ohioans. = – Art Mitchell Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Twelve years ago today, President Obama signed the Healthy, Hunger-Free Kids Act of 2010 into law, giving tens of millions of kids access to free or reduced cost healthy lunches. But too many still fell through the cracks.

Then, when the COVID-19 pandemic began, Bob and his colleagues took action to make free school lunches available to all kids.

But over time, the cold bureaucracy that denied kids a hot meal has returned. And even "reduced price" meals can be difficult to afford for working families still struggling to make ends meet.

Bob is fighting for the return of free school lunch for all, but he needs your help.

**[Will you show your support for universal free school lunch? Show Bob you're with him now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55896648/383194300/416600598?ms=em22_221213_scllnc_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&refcode=em22_221213_scllnc_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&source=em22_221213_scllnc_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221213_scllnc_adv_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=dZ60ll%2B5GxZyPwhCQPoNhRXbFkyiZrm16qOtL6y%2BrILQNZrmQZzkdOgiMTzc7rH99VHYTxt%2F5Vdi3c7H5TxMJ9ptLyMjUSuvUEtGEwFiURnFbevWrxc7RrXS0wMA0gVyCgectxB3osUBbHKkg2DGshHzR3gbxzpc%2FR3ai1CDZXWhzAGEmSEbaNELrB9quZg0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGY5ZTM5Zi1mMjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S89w5cND5t-N_3-HViOD2BP4tkZDJO8bn9LepR3VZaY=&emci=fa42c7b8-3c7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=e8f9e39f-f27a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8943725)**

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: I’m Running for Philadelphia City Council at-Large!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
Hi friend,

I have a long history of taking on powerful interests in Philadelphia and leading important fights for change. That's why I'm running for Philadelphia City Council at-Large.

[**As a former Deputy Mayor and a top vote getter in the city, I have a clear path to victory in this race -- b**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HehF94-xVrcKzAhW5YPPfdyvpRhcxMJjZtoQqYq2op8=/UFzCWhVzNh-gsK09CxPljD2uJi0tDMJKDS4WSixy18g=)**[ut I can 't get there alone. I need your support to build a grassroots campaign that represents our community and what we're fighting for. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/HehF94-xVrcKzAhW5YPPfdyvpRhcxMJjZtoQqYq2op8=/UFzCWhVzNh-gsK09CxPljD2uJi0tDMJKDS4WSixy18g=)**

I am running to make Philadelphia a healthier, stronger city.

All of our challenges are, at their root, health challenges. From crime and gun violence to housing and the environment, if we make Philadelphia a healthier city, we can make it a stronger, safer city.

As a biomedical scientist, I have spent my life taking on these kinds of challenges and I have used science and data to find new solutions to old problems.

**[Your early support is critical to show our campaign's viability, build a strong coalition, and ensure our simple message reaches every voter across Philadelphia: a healthier city for a stronger future.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HehF94-xVrcKzAhW5YPPfdyvpRhcxMJjZtoQqYq2op8=/UFzCWhVzNh-gsK09CxPljD2uJi0tDMJKDS4WSixy18g=)**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/HehF94-xVrcKzAhW5YPPfdyvpRhcxMJjZtoQqYq2op8=/UFzCWhVzNh-gsK09CxPljD2uJi0tDMJKDS4WSixy18g=)

Thanks,
Nina

Paid for by Nina for Philly

Philadelphia PA 19118 United States

Peter, tomorrow marks exactly 10 years since the tragic shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School.

Ten years since we watched the news numbly, frozen in dread and grief as the death toll continued to tick higher. Ten years since the lives of 20 children – some barely older than babies – and six faculty members were cut tragically short. Ten years since we as a nation decided that enough was finally enough and it was time to get serious about gun reform.

But unfortunately, serious gun reform never came. And now, here we are 10 years later, _still_ losing our children at schools, our parents at grocery stores, and our grandparents at places of worship – all to gun violence.

**Peter, I will not sit here and wait passively for the next tragedy to strike.** That’s why, from the moment I took office as your attorney general, I have successfully fought to hold the gun lobby, gun manufacturers, and gun sellers accountable for their egregious actions – but I cannot stop the gun violence epidemic alone.

**I’m counting on the support of 5,000 fearless fighters to stand with me on the eve of this tragic anniversary and demand REAL and meaningful gun safety reform, but I’m still missing your name, Peter. So please, to join this fight, record your response ASAP: **
| | **Should military-style assault weapons be banned nationwide?**
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmjjihh10mvt32b2mtv8bqvbjiid9et5v1c9raq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgmcor6cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9jhgrvc63lrmac2ea9ac3eqedq7u3j4c63sm0po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgmcor6cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeu6jbr4j184qhg98errvk8bqifm20e4qkdv0dh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgmcor6cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu48pgeqki4d7et0kd62s242l9rg8igrjlvab4ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgmcor6cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5c8ka2qoptsk281fan24ogobl3ma5g9pou8atmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgmcor6cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d4687b8b29c34ae991b6c914ffb0b41e&_e=gzD5rB_KGieGQRcW-z2AJNQxPKCZhmdGcvWhfS3G386P2QmqSrK4lGROyRtfNvYHyNsahF4R6wUqleqapKjUiLMHgLGEraI5102Tb6AcXrrqyhOkJcaByb36pT365XfkdLQOey9fl_5IVZyHubl0H3sRnRx6k-GWwpDK0YVMUJZdu1kFaLaJn7RwncuNtA2LzvDnMJIBH4SJZcc4bY8FkcVukSiXsDwQF_0Az_6SFlJhjpwV_UPCCyAxevAnziN3zLtlNxnW5P5pjugtW7Zg2Eankhicv0WYOFwqEvvu81xetG0iHMC8p2xuM76661-5J_BXjAK7SBa_odpigjsSLuF_cKl5NRTW_297yPyLouE%3D)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d4687b8b29c34ae991b6c914ffb0b41e&_e=gzD5rB_KGieGQRcW-z2AJNQxPKCZhmdGcvWhfS3G386P2QmqSrK4lGROyRtfNvYHyNsahF4R6wUqleqapKjUiLMHgLGEraI5102Tb6AcXrrqyhOkJcaByb36pT365XfkdLQOey9fl_5IVZyHubl0H3sRnRx6k-GWwpDK0YVMUJZdu1kFaLaJn7RwncuNtA2LzvDnMJIBH4SJZcc4bY8FkUD6YnsS2OY41i43LneT0mjsPXJem56uAF0hEQXwhDljnRwGkMcPvu637EwthIiJUWOhSRobLTTOItMENcz2B_kpMH3umlejgH0AGk4aoBXHnTRQnGA9bVoqXEMiwdaNeYGeXGE7Hvyz4MMQv_7oPo4%3D)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---

clean_body: World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | (Want to unsubscribe? See link below) Trump is running for president again – and now, Facebook is telling its team to no longer fact-check any of what he says. This is incredibly dangerous. The last time Trump’s election lies were left unchecked on social media, extremists launched the deadly January 6th attack on our Capitol and tried to overturn our election results – the very thing that led Facebook to ban his account. Now, with Facebook considering unbanning Trump as soon as January, they’ve decided to let his election lies run rampant. This is unacceptable. [Sign our petition to demand Mark Zuckerberg and other social media CEOs enforce their own content policies and fact-check Donald Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ee871ce-d082-4fc7-a179-02d09568f379/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Date Set for Primary in VA-04
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
On December 20, Dems will head to the polls to decide who their nominee will be in VA-04.

|
---
Derek, Last night, the Fourth Congressional District Democratic Committee voted unanimously to hold a Firehouse Primary to determine its nominee for the upcoming Special Election to fill the unexpired term of the late Congressman A. Donald McEachin. In order to meet the time constraints of the Governor’s writ of election while operating a transparent, open, and fair election, **the Firehouse Primary will be held on Tuesday, December 20, 2022.** A party-run primary election like this one takes a lot of resources and requires the support of the state party – **[can we count on you to help support DPVA’s efforts to run a fair, open, and expedient primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55904457/383227420/-1925813607?refcode=dpva-em-221213-cd4update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTE4ZDNiMS0wMjdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G4kRiJpG6BmL7GziuTslWXtZ9LetzJxNYmwX1clEpI=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: On December 20, Dems will head to the polls to decide who their nominee will be in VA-04. | Derek, Last night, the Fourth Congressional District Democratic Committee voted unanimously to hold a Firehouse Primary to determine its nominee for the upcoming Special Election to fill the unexpired term of the late Congressman A. Donald McEachin. In order to meet the time constraints of the Governor’s writ of election while operating a transparent, open, and fair election, the Firehouse Primary will be held on Tuesday, December 20, 2022. A party-run primary election like this one takes a lot of resources and requires the support of the state party – = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** To make sure the voices of all Democrats across VA-04 are heard, we need YOUR help to make sure we’re able to efficiently hold a primary that works for all candidates and voters. = Team DPVA =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30ca2e1b99f491f92ab5fb5e072cfb1&_e=9PlLHVRRYWyfp_TM94c79KO-LBHXm0C1fugImch5D1B4UiZuGayYhRB5w6ATlUei51UW5GmnHDOWffvJD-oN7ywTG-yUcxihizKTMt8ItBNL_wvY4ZI3vTYA99d-VTHAK7_Ys5Qd9CWw1VarLq0gzjmq9qBEa4TcDbXsIdEcKubQsgdnPoI8BX-H7-09c4Sik7IJMhtK8QY9yJiLfLp3doylfGhpuo-Exe9bnqWKSBKHWWQL0S7z5sMuLOjf6mu5t25GdjBEpfZnYu90DuHiFUCnFZfJvsCsBMSqHPXOXitrXp7p56I_wCIw7Y7v_KUIsUUDF7G_rDMBE9Wi-ZPnWik5ZbpfmLGOCtJApF0wedAJJ9rGzsTCZ1XwqKLdlnmshG_dQ5DY8HLJkOf5Bdt-4kEHLQXYOeyP4gOCIPvweeYALAgyZ67ldafrP2kaIlLn)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30ca2e1b99f491f92ab5fb5e072cfb1&_e=9PlLHVRRYWyfp_TM94c79KO-LBHXm0C1fugImch5D1B4UiZuGayYhRB5w6ATlUei51UW5GmnHDOWffvJD-oN7ywTG-yUcxihizKTMt8ItBNL_wvY4ZI3vTYA99d-VTHAK7_Ys5Qd9CWw1VarLq0gzjmq9qBEa4TcDbXsIdEcKubQsgdnPoI8BX-H7-09c4Sik7IJMhtK8QY9yJiLfLp3doylfGhpuo-Exe9bnqWKSBKHWWQL0S7z5sMuLOjf6mu5t25GdjBEpfZnYu90DuHiFSrS45tQieAz4u741RHpUiOPgxNNUwzjvR3bMJmPexQ6ECpZYpC8nZwDajM1ccDjZXOCuJCcnhex0EsXT7xq3Mm4OkY2TFdP83KX0ZxvHn6w_u5xUtM4RKGloyM7l07QuVeU0A5Xi-vu4JsMHP9mKrmAqu9aD_6Zl5gl-jhDPhGb)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30ca2e1b99f491f92ab5fb5e072cfb1&_e=9PlLHVRRYWyfp_TM94c79KO-LBHXm0C1fugImch5D1B4UiZuGayYhRB5w6ATlUei51UW5GmnHDOWffvJD-oN7ywTG-yUcxihizKTMt8ItBNL_wvY4ZI3vTYA99d-VTHAK7_Ys5Qd9CWw1VarLq0gzjmq9qBEa4TcDbXsIdEcKubQsgdnPoI8BX-H7-09c4Sik7IJMhtK8QY9yJiLfLp3doylfGhpuo-Exe9bnqWKSBKHWWQL0S7z5sMuLOjf6mu5t25GdjBEpfZnYu90DuHiFYx83QFZBU9sh7WI1r1lazl_7f7jZuOdHr7yknflCEFraaW_yO1wpH_Zt-_U3GE0bp2Zux2Jig5R_Z-NgHXsL4RbdguuSe7J7IAyyAxIesjBl9yn79pFdzh0xJy1yqIpiscZt9bcy9U27BNkrGrfMBHwz7QxIKYJgYD58vXpodB4)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a30ca2e1b99f491f92ab5fb5e072cfb1&_e=9PlLHVRRYWyfp_TM94c79KO-LBHXm0C1fugImch5D1B4UiZuGayYhRB5w6ATlUei51UW5GmnHDOWffvJD-oN7ywTG-yUcxihizKTMt8ItBNL_wvY4ZI3vTYA99d-VTHAK7_Ys5Qd9CWw1VarLq0gzjmq9qBEa4TcDbXsIdEcKubQsgdnPoI8BX-H7-09c4Sik7IJMhtK8QY9yJiLfLp3doylfGhpuo-Exe9bnqWKSBKHWWQL0S7z5sMuLOjf6mu5t25GdjBEpfZnYu90DuHiFcvZSELTl61_ZjRAhoi5jnCkKe50VGhn7qIt05jWABMsljzyq19xidZppRzRRCeI7kIGyMx04l6A9bbkhm2LID32Lq_XoAcA_0e8hbMN6DOtuGbNAJplyNA7K2kFVJU62AgIMrpj8aXpke_S8a2H0WHR6X16Lm3fPEwzAZ5z7yK_).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=a30ca2e1b99f491f92ab5fb5e072cfb1&_t=bvdeA37ccT1LnLNd9VhTz6YEi_mLoUEDpREOgV7fwv6mTwtwkVdiWZrWrkN5mUJrvOUNGFtKJiVopvJ8uDoOzaOi0CrR5uWEDCwbNM65vTxJJ54UXxLEUUwv2K2HeG9c-oh_Nhba8rH8GnVUQ2Ry-ZQy3Kp64WbcU24Sf3U72BQ%3D)
