We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84f782fa-228d-42fe-9c3e-9ff3a1d83a75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Dear Peter, Should President Biden and Senate Democrats look to cut “bipartisan deals” with Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy? Or should they propose bold ideas popular with the public -- and dare Republicans to oppose them? Senator Elizabeth Warren gave Democrats advice for how to navigate the new Republican House: Bipartisanship should mean the public agrees, not DC politicians. **SIGN ONTO THIS STATEMENT TO SHOW YOUR SUPPORT: ** **[_“Any quest for bipartisanship must mean that the PUBLIC agrees with our agenda -- not DC Republican politicians like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy.”_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9335e185-be9c-45ed-8b63-623b42b707f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

---
|
---
| | | We will share the growing number of names with White House and congressional Democratic leaders. They should know the public has their back in proposing bold ideas and picking smart fights. Please sign today and share this with others. **_Sign the petition: [“Any quest for bipartisanship must mean that the PUBLIC agrees with our agenda -- not DC Republican politicians like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Kevin McCarthy.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4ded6da-8462-49d2-b47f-d3d1cc3675ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:

---

| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9krk2qhatodp5dhei45ip7fh555li4m0jj89v8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgm9o34cph2bs)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb77deghm6p3mih91l419ibkbin0ohblebui5lvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgm9o34cph2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z60ucm56pbfkv1g62htobjlhqsdg2uq71li18ln0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgm9o34cph2bs)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd7rshqh7cohg8ued18nao2u72em5u05js0gs1ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjgm9o34cph2bs)

name: American Update
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few yearsand the recent electionhave made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the corruption of our nation’s educational system. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0274%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PDWorHJFtbs59hoB1EotYg&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43504%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XXMPN%2f6V4iofrDjaQnyqZQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation’s educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”

Today it may be less than that.

That’s because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents’ motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as “domestic terrorists.”

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43515%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=svu4PNQ2eaKVV01hpf8mwQ&sysid=1)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “The Real American Founding: A Conversation.” **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why...

As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43516%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C7NFL%2bmE5gvWHHp2siO8gA&sysid=1)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43517%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LK%2bE6olOACQBHoHuq0Mu7g&sysid=1)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0274%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PDWorHJFtbs59hoB1EotYg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0274%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PDWorHJFtbs59hoB1EotYg&sysid=1)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bbe3dd7fc194b10a5aba9644ab562d2&_e=vSOZkyW71xgZfuiy4C6GSDPvJtUJXo-ZW1ZAVemtQzvW2hIyF4IYHAJxWscThpo8cdCsiyZjJEbpNzlms2oduLrsJWtQutHmQ4AzgINa-HerGqirWyJT1wmNgZaqtdPBFnduUj7s12MGAbZM508oGuSEwhW4colCefr0SicpxEHhXjZo7CXFo_Lp3uY_QjGlI4vA9AUtrn6peMqWQn2ISeBlSz7w3DZOtKXbjF9-etoytD0k3KRXHxdAYfKXkLOVx3gqItNPz5GevAoZ4ZuPMqoBry9MuCuMvhY7w_OtyqHGv8s0SrDBvX_Gv4puVKE26QrF9qdpY1mhEGpGZf_akov538YraLzZJDGVcBgWC-3gpeyhgO-UmkKtVNI2X5-TXvEsub7-XJHsmWcPysdkxf5pLVWHf5sZrI93v2kjckM%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bbe3dd7fc194b10a5aba9644ab562d2&_e=vSOZkyW71xgZfuiy4C6GSDPvJtUJXo-ZW1ZAVemtQzvW2hIyF4IYHAJxWscThpo8cdCsiyZjJEbpNzlms2oduLrsJWtQutHmQ4AzgINa-HerGqirWyJT1wmNgZaqtdPBFnduUj7s12MGAbZM508oGuSEwhW4colCefr0SicpxEHhXjZo7CXFo_Lp3uY_QjGlI4vA9AUtrn6peMqWQn2ISeBlSz7w3DZOtKXbjF9-etoytD0k3KRXHxdAYfKXkLOVt6s0u4yc2qAL5GuLakaqNUOXHN6DFcCMoVVSX5eA3f59j8u99ZnDN9PJYo7xWoOSW_jWCvamnHltjVRaqDWX9UQyPicXtCn2l3sfFhiwGLascm0jZiqzJsZcUGERWajM2MElrlQLqDzDQFtsYaOqh2dtK6oWCAQzog1ByG6RIg8%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2bbe3dd7fc194b10a5aba9644ab562d2&_e=vSOZkyW71xgZfuiy4C6GSDPvJtUJXo-ZW1ZAVemtQzvW2hIyF4IYHAJxWscThpo8cdCsiyZjJEbpNzlms2oduLrsJWtQutHmQ4AzgINa-HerGqirWyJT1wmNgZaqtdPBFnduUj7s12MGAbZM508oGuSEwhW4colCefr0SicpxEHhXjZo7CXFo_Lp3uY_QjGlI4vA9AUtrn6peMqWQn2ISeBlSz7w3DZOtKXbjF9-etoytD0k3KRXHxdAYfKXkLOV7j_RWBh0XEDCZvHDYOXWN5OdeQNs4aNpijxm1inaZfIoQawUDVmVa8crIUIJ85vfcQeZwKNGQLJAK1qks4uAuM_1sKzzRVmo8kjxa0-4I7Fc8sLyQAI2VZkzv_lEcoHmRvezRODv_aDN_pRFgNe5ZtB8krDp0J8DTWfsPwf1_T0%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6dadd419588f4acca1885c7bff6ec1c0&_e=ojmj9IZt3ZmdK6-sf6lyq5GmDLDClvOHTLRaG8aLUI3cf7uaZ6myPObRVef7Wx-qiqYwtH6Zd6qGhTDPDpBpi3k77_PddnXWlNNqo9cI0WVemMbwqzGX5kQ1prYayN35pDxJZrrviIuag1QMYgmFFd6BH2_WJD_rPWjVdsoqZxhBe3T-2zHUquodZwJWGkQ2kHeaaRELF8pX0PKQvd6eRlRU4YMNLme12fU4fmWyn_EtLiTp81JmCb-RqyTADb3R7wbAyZa7RaLUCQn2oLuoNsK8eGywtc1srYdzjotmT8K0jebPNRsLkAkNifEPnfdYjUos_K_c5Y7ZHazPBoiPG-44EcNimm0_S_dNwxMKcfjBc8gm2lWT4kXUTqjou3e7uvuDpZKSdCvvNCaQFLgL13wXMs_SvfSnewkHxRMzg-b6Hq-bvtLCO4EX3c8gOq8H)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6dadd419588f4acca1885c7bff6ec1c0&_e=ojmj9IZt3ZmdK6-sf6lyq5GmDLDClvOHTLRaG8aLUI3cf7uaZ6myPObRVef7Wx-qiqYwtH6Zd6qGhTDPDpBpi3k77_PddnXWlNNqo9cI0WVemMbwqzGX5kQ1prYayN35pDxJZrrviIuag1QMYgmFFd6BH2_WJD_rPWjVdsoqZxhBe3T-2zHUquodZwJWGkQ2kHeaaRELF8pX0PKQvd6eRlRU4YMNLme12fU4fmWyn_EtLiTp81JmCb-RqyTADb3R7wbAyZa7RaLUCQn2oLuoNlGjpeKu4jhKzkmmPA0AOXQmQ7i39p95sN-jRvK3gDelJPcNUV5bZrJSUc36Lu6CfINKE8_rhauIr1Ol8h3QUQncRaAD5dWaIT2jq_3CJf3_Wri_9HYr928szWxoqbnYTKYalPIslvXUiEz877ShVfjrT3nE3Qk1AhhjmRNp1HSx)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6dadd419588f4acca1885c7bff6ec1c0&_e=ojmj9IZt3ZmdK6-sf6lyq5GmDLDClvOHTLRaG8aLUI3cf7uaZ6myPObRVef7Wx-qiqYwtH6Zd6qGhTDPDpBpi3k77_PddnXWlNNqo9cI0WVemMbwqzGX5kQ1prYayN35pDxJZrrviIuag1QMYgmFFd6BH2_WJD_rPWjVdsoqZxhBe3T-2zHUquodZwJWGkQ2kHeaaRELF8pX0PKQvd6eRlRU4YMNLme12fU4fmWyn_EtLiTp81JmCb-RqyTADb3R7wbAyZa7RaLUCQn2oLuoNgFB1LhrIzEt8eNOozgHEfrctR0DD3RWW4JyG7DsXTfoXXAxz6Lw475jbJ3upiaSqBqp8jFL0VPWht5m0o8icxDbsrhwnWZTVTPYSWaBuR0Jr_P3vB9s-fah7FtGrEyVaUc0TzQoTmJrN9tO8-x_zjZtTQ68VEiB0acZ00ujuMK7)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6dadd419588f4acca1885c7bff6ec1c0&_e=ojmj9IZt3ZmdK6-sf6lyq5GmDLDClvOHTLRaG8aLUI3cf7uaZ6myPObRVef7Wx-qiqYwtH6Zd6qGhTDPDpBpi3k77_PddnXWlNNqo9cI0WVemMbwqzGX5kQ1prYayN35pDxJZrrviIuag1QMYgmFFd6BH2_WJD_rPWjVdsoqZxhBe3T-2zHUquodZwJWGkQ2kHeaaRELF8pX0PKQvd6eRlRU4YMNLme12fU4fmWyn_EtLiTp81JmCb-RqyTADb3R7wbAyZa7RaLUCQn2oLuoNha5qlQm9P0qkeUnMTZWF7lHoaDj5aL7P_JjYApPxidnkJGJZtPb9thzeNQ5U4rNe0frrm9nnrkjIFXH8YxxEM4N_gAAHEY_KjngZ_96KfQcUgKxrf6AnukanDwuqpc5KAOkGpwSP1SO7AfZWJl5WsQMxijss7glVXkYLe7oiY7J).

| Endorsement Alert! Former Goochland Sheriff
Jim Agnew
Endorses John McGuire
For State Senator for Virginia's 10th District

---
| | |
---|---
|
I am proud to endorse fellow veteran and Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate District 10. John has a consistent conservative voting record in the General Assembly and he is a staunch supporter of our law enforcement and first responders.

Jim Agnew
-Former 27 Year Goochland County Sheriff

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
| I have enjoyed representing Goochland County as a Delegate in District 56 for the last five years, and it is a huge honor to receive the endorsement of fellow veteran and former Goochland Sheriff Jim Agnew. Jim served 41 years as a law enforcement officer and 27 years as Sheriff of Goochland County. I am fired up, full of energy, and ready to continue fighting for you in State Senate District 10.
It was decided that we will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ff28cHnoFRqDuGlSyxsmRLxjAWDXidUYVI4xOuc71U3WaJ8kyzFeR3xQVL4FgOK7Xx5H6UbZwFIy6BC_kMbTRspfR1pBbl9EjlTbUznPkl-pCTojfqSQDa2CWqbtexAn3Gbsqsb9yF9BUzLNKg_VrpF1DTr-c0qCdB82OPvhwjoi9tRtXZE1q_pBZpvNrvcN-7stFQNaUWthLYF2r6BdFw9jhG0_TW4BeLaI7Fu2oM7i5sR9ptDklVCAMMZCXidX&c=aObwXd_5JqZVma7BfbtRSr848FjkHZn-hwPdunfJKYLOJOrrw01AFQ==&ch=hNOH-gFZmRlrVQHiXXwybjWQwnzURy5qX3ipaaYTCaJtNi-iOAi8Nw==) and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP.
I respectfully ask you to forward this email/ [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ff28cHnoFRqDuGlSyxsmRLxjAWDXidUYVI4xOuc71U3WaJ8kyzFeR3xQVL4FgOK7Xx5H6UbZwFIy6BC_kMbTRspfR1pBbl9EjlTbUznPkl-pCTojfqSQDa2CWqbtexAn3Gbsqsb9yF9BUzLNKg_VrpF1DTr-c0qCdB82OPvhwjoi9tRtXZE1q_pBZpvNrvcN-7stFQNaUWthLYF2r6BdFw9jhG0_TW4BeLaI7Fu2oM7i5sR9ptDklVCAMMZCXidX&c=aObwXd_5JqZVma7BfbtRSr848FjkHZn-hwPdunfJKYLOJOrrw01AFQ==&ch=hNOH-gFZmRlrVQHiXXwybjWQwnzURy5qX3ipaaYTCaJtNi-iOAi8Nw==) to family and friends in Senate District 10. name: Candace Owens
subject: Hollywood = Satanic Values
body:
Would you believe me if I said that a mother watched videos of her daughter having sex with her boyfriend and picked which one h
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr43l5haqlbt0n1kek28fk2kij9ff32bh2b76atg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
Friend,

Would you believe me if I said that a mother watched videos of her daughter having sex with her boyfriend and picked which one her daughter looked best in to **sell?**

Because that's exactly what happened -- Kris Jenner watched AND hand-picked which sex tape her daughter Kim Kardashian would release!

**It is not an exaggeration to say that Hollywood is satanic.**

What could possibly be more satanic than a mother using her daughter's body to sell sex?

If that disgusts you, here's where it gets worse. _It worked_. Kim Kardashian is a billionaire, and she's still selling sex.

She is symbolic of the society we live in today. That if you are willing to degrade yourself, if you're willing to denigrate yourself, then our society will give you more.

**Is this the example we want to leave for our children?**

At BLEXIT, we believe families should be grounded in faith and honor and respect their children and protect their innocence.

My name is Candace Owens, co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. BLEXIT focuses on educating minorities about the history of our great country, the principles of the Constitution, and the importance of self-reliance.

I've set a goal to raise $50,000 by the end of the month to show the next generation that they don't have to be like the Kardashians to be successful.

[**Can you support this critical mission with a gift of $10, $25, or even $50? Click here to donate today >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z50rhh7gcv8t7srv2r1jq3houhpvs61inebiqa6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)

BLEXIT is bringing pro-America, pro-Family values to Black and minority communities through the work of our State Chapters.

Our Chapters spread the universal principles of the BLEXIT movement at the local level through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

They demonstrate how people can escape the mentality of victimhood and empower others to take control of their destinies.

Just this summer, **BLEXIT-Fest in New Jersey introduced our message to over 400 people.** They had a variety of talented performers and speakers and created a memorable community celebration.

**BLEXIT chapter members from our Tampa, FL, and North Charleston, SC sites educated and cared for approximately 80 children** for six weeks during our full-day Summer Camp.

The children in our Tampa program even took a field trip to Legoland!

Now that school has started, these BLEXIT chapters are providing an after-school youth education program - Liberation Camp - for 80 children.

_BLEXIT 's Chapters are a huge part of our Back to School initiative_.

The BLEXIT Illinois Chapter **distributed over 400 school supplies** and BLEXIT merchandise in one of Chicago's most impoverished communities. The NY Chapter was fortunate to **give away 120 school supply kits as well as 40 book bags.**

BLEXIT Chapters are changing the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

[**We currently have 42 chapters across the US and more than 14,000 volunteers! You can help BLEXIT support our State Chapters by donating $10, $25, $50, or any other amount today. Click here to send your gift >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlabh26eoqb8s7guhpt5bdumm8e0us5vgrcugdgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)

BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence reinforced by groups that market themselves as serving the Black community, such as Black Lives Matter, but in actuality, they destroy communities.

These organizations are poisoning minority communities. They tell these bright young men and women they are victims of systematic repression and that their skin color is all that defines them.

But here's the ugly truth about other organizations who claim to serve the Black community:

* They claim to support Black communities. . . but they fan the flames of riots and violence that directly impact the lives of the people in those communities.

* They claim to fight for criminal justice reform. . . but they teach Black men and women to hate and disrespect police officers.

* They claim to be a non-profit group fighting for Black men and women. . . but they use donor funds to enrich themselves.

**These other organizations are destroying Black communities, dividing our country, and forcing a message of victimhood and hatred down the throats of minorities.**

BLEXIT is countering their hateful narrative, but we can't do it alone, Friend. Can you donate to BLEXIT today and help us reach our goal of raising $50,000?
[**Donate $10 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbq9jvlv1g09ai2df51m8vrur0vtj8rh2k7qm8qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc5upnk84q80uapuei3ggi3hq94sfnvif2osvmv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj2a5bcja49r1k8a77lpn8iiriinsa08c7l9d9m8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc97jkc3lt97ropajkophmdldahc5hjb62627lco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo22hc37mvmlaj48r4kiq7i5cflcu0tnd39srar0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ruunsfnp8p890fthufpbubfqn23okisoao1258_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgqusu2p1nf54anpo69qb05peajg8hkn5cvj8ljo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate $2,500 >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfng0ltoe78cmsah8rbq7nm6qnrsej29iief9cio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhv9v9m34q1f325otkm9ldmeia56fmub194p338_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim6oj4c1h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

name: PA Democrats
subject: The GOP is attacking democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Republicans have taken their fight all the way to the United States Supreme Court and they are coming for the very systems that protect our free and fair elections. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, **_2019:_**_Republican lawmakers tried to pass a law that would harm Democratic voters and leave our elections insecure, but Governor Wolf vetoed it.__1_ **_2020:_**_Republicans tried to toss 2.5 million votes to help Trump win Pennsylvania, but our State Supreme Court had the power to stop them and sided with the voters. 2_

**_2021:_**_They came after our voting rights again, but Governor Wolf still had his veto power and stopped them in their tracks. 3_ **_This year_** _they came after our mail-in voting, but the State Supreme Court had the power to stop them and they used it. 4_ But now, Republicans have taken their fight all the way to the United States Supreme Court and they are coming for the very systems that protect our free and fair elections. In _Moore v. Harper_ , North Carolina Republican leaders argue that state legislatures should have **unchecked power** to implement redistricting, voting laws, election laws, and more.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55922795/383253975/1978883179?refcode=email121222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDE2NTM1OS0xODdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFA4E6sgo_d0Sp6m1KmA0aK37CdS4slEabTzbgqwjH8=)
---
So what does that mean for Pennsylvania? If Republicans win this Supreme Court case, Governor-Elect Shapiro might not have veto power and courts might not be able to step in the next time Harrisburg Republicans attempt to disenfranchise voters. We must ensure we are prepared to stop the GOP when they **come after our voting rights, meddle with our elections, break up our neighborhoods with gerrymandering, and give our electoral votes to Donald Trump in 2024** , despite the will of the people. Our last line of defense is under attack. We are preparing to fight. [**S****tand with Pennsylvania Democrats, and help us hold the line for our democracy by maintaining and growing our legislative and judicial majorities****!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55922796/383253976/1978883179?refcode=email121222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDE2NTM1OS0xODdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SFA4E6sgo_d0Sp6m1KmA0aK37CdS4slEabTzbgqwjH8=)

name: Team Jazz
subject: You're Invited! Join us for a holiday happy hour
body:
Join us for a holiday party in support of

Delegate Jazz Lewis

Friday, December 16, 2022
6:00-7:30pm
Home of Ryan Middleton and Dr. Jasmine Reed-Middleton
11708 Silvercreek Ct
Bowie, MD 20720

For questions or more information contact Megan at (240) 283-4899 or megan@skybp.com.

RSVP HERE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec16happyhour]

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]

By Authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7519%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=qycPB%2b94aijiei%2beH0BaAA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96416%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3L0Gxo77R8LoFJT9%2bwUVsw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96417%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y8KKVDnygnNC1jYIE%2fGvXw&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96418%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XssIqPQsOWU1n8dWl2OHYw&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7519%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=qycPB%2b94aijiei%2beH0BaAA&sysid=1)_

name: MTG
subject: How we reclaim and win Georgia again (long email, please read when you have a few minutes)
body:
Peter,

I'm reaching out today with a bit of a longer email, and I hope you'll take the time to read my thoughts on the future of the Republican Party and the roadmap to winning in states like Georgia again.

The media would have you believe that the Republican Party got crushed in the midterm elections, but they are lying to you in an effort to demoralize conservatives and avoid covering the impending investigations into Biden's impeachable offenses.

**I'm not taking the bait.** Instead I'm focusing on two things, holding the Biden Administration accountable as a member of the House Oversight Committee and positioning our party to win in 2024.

The electoral landscape has changed as a result of the rules Democrats unconstitutionally rammed through during COVID, and **[The Left has adapted far better than Republicans](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r).** Democrats understand that the election system they have built is no longer about voters, it's about ballots... [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r) ... And the only way we'll ever get back to **paper ballots on Election DAY** (Not Election MONTH) is by beating them in 2024.

As you know, we've suffered some heartbreaking losses in Georgia over the past two election cycles, and if we're going to reclaim our advantage in Georgia, we must make some changes.

Democrats have waged war on our elections, and if we're going to win again, we must meet them where they are fighting.

**When they ballot harvest, we must ballot harvest.**

**When they vote early, we must vote early.**

**When they vote by mail, we must vote by mail.**

**_When they litigate, we must litigate._**

**[This requires an entire rethinking and restructuring of our campaign operation in Georgia, and it must start now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r).**

You may be wondering why we must start now, the next election is 2 years away. I'll tell you why, because the Democrats in Georgia are already working and winning the 2024 election for Joe Biden.

We must match their investment and execute a superior strategy, amd it is the only way we will win.

I know you're probably tired of receiving fundraising emails from Republicans, especially ones who end up losing. This email isn't about losing, and I don't even consider it fundraising. **[I'm asking you to make an investment in my effort to flip Georgia red and deliver the 16 electoral college votes to President Trump in 2024](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r) I know how to win and turn out voters in Georgia, I've done it twice in my district, and I'm going to do it again in 2024, but I need to keep my campaign fully staffed and expand our operation to reach voters who stayed home in 2020 and 2022.

Over the course of the next year we're going to be investing heavily in data, focused very heavily on early voters and mail voters. We just can't afford to go into Election Day with less early and mail votes than the Democrats. It's a recipe for disaster and disappointment.

**[That's why I'm asking you to invest early in our effort to beat the Democrats at their new game](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r).**

Anything you can give will go directly to laying the necessary groundwork to build a winning campaign in Georgia in 2024.

In Liberty,

Marjorie
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61262746:sRpbHYDNd:m:1:2365227053:031E7FC2B1E93F9EF79B48C77ADDCE10:r)
---
* * *
Greene for Congress, Inc.
3 Central Plaza #142
Rome, GA 30161
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system January 17, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isRpbHYDNd). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRpbHYDNd)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7eu2qtk5ujhm2jq1jlb417gl9p3tn2u3ah439uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim0o72cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaif08bev7qq4rhknu4pcv38im18pl31iv0dsamo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim0o72cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoau7p4i54m216cnba107umtid5cllqcau9uahg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim0o72cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztfbu3hkfhhco2dtbhk7e7ji43dhqtpihshd9c88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim0o72cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Jake Evans
subject: Wokeism is Endangering Our Kids!
body:
These woke policies MUST end! They are endangering our children and creating a system under which there are no consequences for actions. We
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.trailblazerising.org/so/d5OK9WSyT/c?w=ch1e1sZYJFUeVmkwcBpEhWdqu2ZtsvhHWqNR9GGzsvg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJhaWxibGF6ZXJpc2luZy5vcmcvc28vZDVPSzlXU3lUP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYTEzMDFhZGQtYmU4ZC00YmJhLWExY2UtMTZjZDBhZjYyNjFmIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends, Our schools are becoming increasingly more violent, with one in ten teachers being attacked by students. As a soon-to-be parent, this is particularly concerning and should be concerning to us all. We cannot ignore the need to combat this issue head-on. Rule of law must be respected, and our law enforcement must be supported. Law and order includes holding our elected officials accountable, especially the local school board officials who are aiding acts of violence by supporting new disciplinary policies like the woke “Restorative Justice”, which removes any semblance of accountability for bad acts in our schools, and holding our youth accountable. Recently in Gwinnett County, Georgia, because of “Restorative Justice” policies, there has been an increase in weapons found on campuses. From 2021 to 2022, the number of fights grew from 750 to 991. That is a 32% increase! Likewise, last year 144 weapons were found in Gwinnett schools, compared to 182 found this year. The Gwinnett County Discipline handbook states that a student could face a one-year expulsion for having a weapon. But the new policy of “Restorative Justice” gives discretion to administrators on how to discipline students allowing teachers to apply subjective standards permitting violators to go without penalty. The Southern Poverty Law Center, a progressive, woke propagator, advised the Gwinnett school board to implement “Restorative Justice” disciplinary standards in all Gwinnett schools.
---
| | [](https://www.trailblazerising.org/so/d5OK9WSyT/c?w=hXB0LfY82ad52eH4ZdXxbaAfjeYQ-UGFvaR-AW2yjX0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJhaWxibGF6ZXJpc2luZy5vcmcvc28vZDVPSzlXU3lUP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwiciI6ImMzY2RmZmI3LThjOWYtNGE5My05ZGE1LWFjYzEzMGE4Mjg0MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImExMzAxYWRkLWJlOGQtNGJiYS1hMWNlLTE2Y2QwYWY2MjYxZiJ9)
---
| | These woke policies MUST end! They are endangering our children and creating a system under which there are no consequences for actions. We must raise our kids to appreciate and understand the importance of rule of law and accountability. Without an appreciation of these principles, we are raising a lawless generation fixated on identity characteristics that allow some to get off the hook while others don’t. We cannot let that be.
---
| | | [**END WOKE POLICIES**](https://www.trailblazerising.org/so/d5OK9WSyT/c?w=3MoyEI77hm-kwLjM8TJsFFWruoC0x4GDno0ke2sNj4Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFpbGJsYXplci1yaXNpbmcucmV2di5jby8zMTJkMDcwM2MyOGYzMzllIiwiciI6IjcyMTk0NzQyLWEwOTEtNGI4Mi1jODA0LWFhNjBmNmMyMmM0MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImExMzAxYWRkLWJlOGQtNGJiYS1hMWNlLTE2Y2QwYWY2MjYxZiJ9)
---
| | Very truly yours,Jake EvansFounder & Chairman at Trailblazer Rising Inc.

clean_body: These woke policies MUST end! They are endangering our children and creating a system under which there are no consequences for actions. We | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Our schools are becoming increasingly more violent, with one in ten teachers being attacked by students. As a soon-to-be parent, this is particularly concerning and should be concerning to us all. We cannot ignore the need to combat this issue head-on. Rule of law must be respected, and our law enforcement must be supported. Law and order includes holding our elected officials accountable, especially the local school board officials who are aiding acts of violence by supporting new disciplinary policies like the woke “Restorative Justice”, which removes any semblance of accountability for bad acts in our schools, and holding our youth accountable. Recently in Gwinnett County, Georgia, because of “Restorative Justice” policies, there has been an increase in weapons found on campuses. From 2021 to 2022, the number of fights grew from 750 to 991. That is a 32% increase! Likewise, last year 144 weapons were found in Gwinnett schools, compared to 182 found this year. The Gwinnett County Discipline handbook states that a student could face a one-year expulsion for having a weapon. But the new policy of “Restorative Justice” gives discretion to administrators on how to discipline students allowing teachers to apply subjective standards permitting violators to go without penalty. The Southern Poverty Law Center, a progressive, woke propagator, advised the Gwinnett school board to implement “Restorative Justice” disciplinary standards in all Gwinnett schools. | | | | These woke policies MUST end! They are endangering our children and creating a system under which there are no consequences for actions. We must raise our kids to appreciate and understand the importance of rule of law and accountability. Without an appreciation of these principles, we are raising a lawless generation fixated on identity characteristics that allow some to get off the hook while others don’t. We cannot let that be. | | | | | Very truly yours,Jake EvansFounder & Chairman at Trailblazer Rising Inc. | | | | | GET INVOLVED | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please .

name: Great America Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7509%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZIis%2bVkLMz4nLg%2bIl1LuxA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77345%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xBQCNlKyaIWzQSg%2b0VtFtw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77346%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6A0SmnljXzbsGji8UTBJ2A&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77347%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c8jH6RbE6zfgbK9ZdJqQiA&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7509%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZIis%2bVkLMz4nLg%2bIl1LuxA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7509%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZIis%2bVkLMz4nLg%2bIl1LuxA&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqii8j9soa4nonkd9orlrrmund9qmiin0pluvvko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7t3b75of1eblnm2isvqft84t0d8nh2erojalqd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z752quumq8ne90g21a8h6dhrba3ne2h2ieqebo6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ajgl7hs83afm26hj67qti0o9njl1ukjh9pdgo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Join the Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhlilt9cqg2l2fa5cm04p90oakskulu17b9d2b40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqieg7k3ica48h71a2np0bvmlvaanctigpodmvc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkg6vdh7vtj93d5j4dqars66dt2osrsoqqn5kjdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi8iq71ke9pclgpc3da70t2hhav7b9htb7iko738_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim2ob2chh2bs)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zvu6u5gljuuvhb66t6o6t7u0rljh6qjorhrt32co).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjict264er9s8cifot5rgkoonupiketupos8aoqo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1ieaob1c9i649fg)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kyrsten Sinema announced she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent right after Democrats across the country were celebrating having a clear, 51-seat majority in the Senate, undermining us all once again. Can you help stiffen Democrats’ resolve to finally challenge her repeated betrayals?
body:
Don’t put up with it
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c6d6f72-8b02-45a4-82c2-998de32db5c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **We’re sure you’ve heard, but she's made it official, KYRSTEN SINEMA HAS STABBED EVERY DEMOCRAT IN THE BACK.** **_During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years—and after Arizona Democratic candidates proved to be the clear choice of the state’s voters for top offices—Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent._ ** _Sinema's counting on our being scared she'll split the vote in 2024 if we run a true Democrat, that we'll sit back and take her betrayal. Don't let her do it. You win not with fear, but leadership. _ _**_Congressman Ruben Gallego is a force, a charismatic, young, progressive Latino veteran, who understands "loyalty" in a way that is alien to Sinema. He's talked about primarying her already for all her betrayals. So let's get him in the race. Not next month or next year. NOW._** _ [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising week for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2be30452-b57e-42c0-ba34-47ee58294bf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Only a response that Democrats won't be held hostage, will support Gallego with all they have while making her into a nobody by stripping her of all Senate power will get this done. She can't caucus with Republicans, or her plan to appeal to some Democrats fails. If she caucuses with nobody, she is a nobody, and we still retain our advantage (50-49-1, instead of 51-49, still enough for us to have a real majority)._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T111867d2-c055-41d2-956a-799ab673c0e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Even Joe Manchin didn't consult Sinema when he cut a deal with Joe Biden in July. From CNN.com: _Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her._ **_So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024._** [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising week for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef260e29-0763-4445-866a-165c0c219296/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much for standing for what’s right._
---
Cliff

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: Personally wish President Trump and his family a Merry Christmas

body:

name: ICYMI News
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmpp7b2160f7u3m9bcsrscq7mmorgoehkrrolpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjimapj2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z61pvcm2kcsc59uk7c4gasie4ta4jadsotiie538_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjimapj2clh2bs)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1pbrhn25pto8p5i2q379ucntsbree1v8ug80c4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjimapj2clh2bs)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjmr85mrhffmdk0r50r5isjn20mpq9kvnmtfu318_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjimapj2clh2bs)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z7jgkr2lldfdveqh9ai1p0f3m40ug1u4uf757slg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0mh55p50ls54smcuqcbs2r7uhgoeov6oe6rbr8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjimapj2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55926636/383267167/814545102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDczYjdiOWYtMjI3Yi1lZDExLTgxOWMtMDAwZDNhOWViNDc0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnKkc0YK9EUsV80eLN-bDCHeF3uKdNhhVLyAn0R_geA=&emci=15dee7b1-ec7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=473b7b9f-227b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2525212)
---
Friend, Thanks to you, we did the improbable and made history by winning the Maryland gubernatorial election this past November. Now, I’m cordially inviting you to join me and Aruna for our historic Inauguration Day on January 18, 2023. **First, you’re invited to our public swearing-in ceremony at the Maryland State House in Annapolis at 12:00 PM.** Come watch me and Aruna be sworn-in as your new Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland! [**Then, join us for the People’s Inaugural Ball at the Baltimore Convention Center that evening to celebrate! Tickets are limited, so RSVP now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55926637/383267169/-139683981?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDczYjdiOWYtMjI3Yi1lZDExLTgxOWMtMDAwZDNhOWViNDc0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnKkc0YK9EUsV80eLN-bDCHeF3uKdNhhVLyAn0R_geA=&emci=15dee7b1-ec7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=473b7b9f-227b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2525212) **The People’s Ball**
Wed. January 18, 2023
7:00 PM – 11:30 PM (Doors open at 6:30 PM)
Baltimore Convention Center, 1 W Pratt Street, Baltimore, MD 21201
Attire is celebratory chic! | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55926639/383267170/-139683981?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDczYjdiOWYtMjI3Yi1lZDExLTgxOWMtMDAwZDNhOWViNDc0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnKkc0YK9EUsV80eLN-bDCHeF3uKdNhhVLyAn0R_geA=&emci=15dee7b1-ec7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=473b7b9f-227b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2525212)
---
This will be an unforgettable event with premier live performances and special guests — you don’t want to miss it.
Additional details regarding parking, security, and other logistics will be provided upon RSVP and by email in advance of the event. I hope you can join us for this historic celebration!
Elevate,
Wes
PS — Celebrate the inauguration in style by wearing one of our**commemorative t-shirts, long-sleeves, crewnecks, or hoodies! Stickers and buttons available too.** [**Shop our inauguration merch here →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55926642/383267171/-2056596492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI3NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDczYjdiOWYtMjI3Yi1lZDExLTgxOWMtMDAwZDNhOWViNDc0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wnKkc0YK9EUsV80eLN-bDCHeF3uKdNhhVLyAn0R_geA=&emci=15dee7b1-ec7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=473b7b9f-227b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2525212)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcfns3e7bl83mgnb4kr886rq758t42p4hq5lmre8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjhm8or1c9h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjvu75vksa9oi2649vmh2to8c796mevp1vs7gng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjhm8or1c9h2bs)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ao39d8o0pphgcag98ih9eldfng4g91qh4nkmc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjhm8or1c9h2bs)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfjqe243kho5ipmrb6emlfmmphap78ugrp1hcn88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjhm8or1c9h2bs)** There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z07cg2055r7rgrn9o2c35pn9ohe2gu79ivlehcc0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhkd2e8gu5c90f33031g85p2viju17p2q06bp0i0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1ie6p33c5h649fg)
