Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the

| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zptil9ai0mbh23qs8ufrdd1qorgocfbdrha3jdd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3p13ck8f2he6egdoe8nejop7otmh1tmg5956o58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36cph2bs)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z811on6dta7om74eijok9tkk09dfqd6h6jnscqq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36cph2bs)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zso0kqcdtfjsck75msah3m96d1ffb72ncftjdjhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36cph2bs)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zju2bknioo9i0lqor9qeoafp1g426p66h3km9f60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6t6kki47p82t60n7npsq69taer5hj7h03k4dcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zituk2ho6misi6qi5u4gkut756f4ghgdoojg3ooo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cjim1o36c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

I’m sick and tired of the lies and empty promises Establishment RINOs give us year after year and I know you are too.

As you know, McCarthy is weak on holding the line against the Democrats' radical agenda, and has failed to provide the strong and decisive leadership that we need in the face of their constant attacks on our values.

I’ve always fought for the conservative principles that make this country great, the same ones that bolstered the best economy we’ve seen in years before the pandemic.

America’s best days truly are ahead of us, **but only if we stand up to the establishment and take back leadership.**

I can do this as a Speaker, but I cannot get there without you.

**[Join my fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy and usher in a new era of America First leadership as Speaker of the House>>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkcuO3CAQRb8G72zxaL8WXiTpzEgz0SxGs0k2qBqq3SQG3GDL6r8PWE4iRUII7oXLoQoH1rS0P9Vd1xZ6gAauqAszcMo540ywWlDeVa0QjIJCRnuq6hMjJ4oWzFQB2yAE722lvC1uQyd6RqnogSreAuVYw7XroKOIrG8UFNNwW5Y5EvGJ8Kc0Iqo1YLUZF1DnkKSB04-LGceY1xepvZPeyi1INcYyOHkJ8g8fEU9g_eoWIs68JrwJOS8YNyZhCSsmaV2stKjNapO2Yx9i9GtQmESnJgl2nsz1cVgqbcGMLsfuD5U7UGaBxWSg6WFno3IuyKMGUnk3BoxRJgAfE6f_hQFG_Id7pHu34M6cXi5fPuLXZ6cv7Zxs6Sajk_GfeDM61ex8PzXXH_CNF2HQ82amycSmTc0Y92bkFhzfGEj7mXC-X-N8rza_f99sWH_a1-fy7fxe3ps3W2eTf0nz8pjx78kjpDqKxUl7_g3t3LJV)**

Andy Biggs

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: Thank you for everything you’ve given to your party and your country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Once you relax, reflect, and recharge, we’ll be here to help you get back to work. We’re going to help you continue to write history. | |
---
Derek -- First off, from the bottom of my heart, I just want to say thank you. There were a lot of predictions about how the midterm elections of 2022 would play out. They said history wasn’t on our side. But for nearly two years, I’ve given the same response: we were going to __make__ our own history. That’s exactly what we did. That’s exactly what __you__ did! At every level, you helped elect Democrats. **Now that every ballot has been cast and counted, thank you for everything you’ve given to your party and your country.** Because of you, President Biden has signed more meaningful bills into law than in a generation. Because of you, every single Democratic senator running for re-election won -- plus, Pennsylvania elected John Fetterman. Because of you, we increased the number of Democratic governors. Because of you, we held the Republicans to a thin majority in the House that will help us to hold them accountable over the next two years. Because of you, we beat back a red wave that sought to set the progress of this country back by decades. How did we do this? We never lost focus on what mattered. We spent the last two years investing in our state parties and infrastructure. We cut out all the noise and ignored our differences and focused on what unites us as a party and as a country. In every single community, you found a Democrat putting in the work. We didn’t go home and stay quiet after Election Day 2020. We were out there fighting for voting rights, registering voters, and getting them out to the polls. We were showing what true leadership looks like through public service in all its forms. We were delivering. And as the year winds down, I know many of you will take a much deserved break, but that doesn’t mean we’re done. _You are not just a Democrat on Election Day._ Everyday throughout the year you are showing your values and serving your communities. That’s what sets us apart from the MAGA Republicans: They spend all of their time and energy scheming to hold onto power and playing political games. They talk a lot, but they never put in the work. **Once you relax, reflect, and recharge, we’ll be here to help you get back to work.** We’re going to help you continue to write history. Wishing you a joyous holiday season and a happy healthy new year! Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee

---

name: Add Your Name (Left Action)
subject: Sign the Petition: Arrest the "Treason Texting" Congressmembers
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Bring Criminal Charges against "Treason Texting" Congressmembers](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e5635a9-f1cf-4354-aae5-46b3fe0ae5de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78ea5d9b-89fe-4e54-9a0f-925df1730784/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action? Forward this email to friends so we can make as big an impact as possible! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_ In a treasure trove of texts following the 2020 election, just obtained by [Talking Points Memo](https://default.salsalabs.org/T857d8a64-34cd-4ffa-b342-7ab6845553b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), we can see with our own eyes a coup playing out in real time. Members of Congress, openly calling for the overturning of a democratic election — [and even for Trump to impose martial law](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc502123-86d9-4f9e-b671-875889771237/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). (misspelled as "marshall" law) The texts come from Trump White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, and include exchanges with at least 34 members of Congress. Many go well beyond the usual chest-thumping idiocy, and cross into outright criminal territory. [**Which is why we need to demand that criminal charges be brought against the treason texters who broke the law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4054d302-7511-43ba-a407-04797c57c059/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) These weren't just emails from your crazy uncle, they were elected officials actively plotting to subvert our democracy — by force if necessary. And if we don't take action now, they'll surely try again, and maybe succeed. [**Add your name, and demand that criminal charges be brought against the treason texters who broke the law.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e3cf11e-8017-466b-b1e3-b569c6a77d22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td442c78a-98d4-4b8b-9044-fbfc6efc7979/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Paid sick leave should not be controversial.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzC9IG0sxC6KbetZLRUH3idnF60GgtvKn8vlbg7R-xmmPdVDLAFPo0GAS4pn7bWMPareS0MBRaOog97EPLVSgdZmNvypL8hSudsjuOi5Q4sRGEbN407ryo849SIHGGNwVXnIis2bLcQa5u5RTH9xhcgbMSj4w3jFje-VH53TNSPgrI57jO2K1tUbVxuPr9LBhhBjaZ5MYN0SJqQOGYCN2yQ2h7oJKDQQ-LizBX3X-2xRjqCErMKSAQ-K7YM2vVWApsTdQADGLcAZSznJDcO62acnpuq1XZh8WK5YkyIbR_Zlb-Fe5Ht8SA4QowhYRMuRj53h1YzTJ2gga5askUP-lFo-ptKg9ojZgaAq5Xy6duL0pm0gTJV8AgSe0-gfls_bQfA/3ry/exsht6TGQyC8Q3dJWL4spA/h0/mdWldtUmSgCQrh-lqczSnzG1aSvfp9Dl9nYDsffE-rU)
---
Peter, You may have heard the news recently that railroad workers across the country planned to go on strike if Congress failed to agree on a deal to improve their working conditions and raise their pay. A deal was struck, but it was missing one crucial component that the rail unions were fighting for: **paid sick leave.** It’s not just railroad workers, Peter. As it stands, tens of thousands of workers in the service, construction, and farming industries still don’t get paid sick days. Every day, hard-working Americans are forced to make a tough decision between working and getting paid or taking care of their health and losing income. **It’s unacceptable, and in my view, paid sick leave should not be a controversial issue.** Throughout my campaign for Congress, I made it clear that I stand with workers fighting for basic benefits like sick leave. That’s why I was endorsed by the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers, the Amalgamated Transit Union, and the AFL-CIO. In Congress, I’ll do everything in my power to speak up for the workers who are so vital to our economy and our country. **[If you’re with me, please send in a donation of $5 today. Your support right now will help bolster our efforts to fight for workers and demand paid sick leave.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzC9IG0sxC6KbetZLRUH3idnF60GgtvKn8vlbg7R-xmmPdVDLAFPo0GAS4pn7bWMPareS0MBRaOog97EPLVSgdZlfM01Yg30IuRBrdecB1f7KZHwKsgWR1HZ3_C7hUaqMMqrxigBiki7StuT-a77FtfObyOJj71AT66qlIUb31pE9gDNElKx1XEqpVUAuel2oDJY-C9Orq70FrPVcyaE6t56VDrTutZ_b-XW3hURV-dKaDm3XZurg6FB5U5ezHio01LGgBpVcnvT14gYjtZ9WBYDoUPhmuo9U4zzvWDnYmBVY70Jw706V120RDq-i3Fic_Zs6CRVzSA2OKNVy_4KUo7MaGSVkCB2UAKnYgXY1MVIq2SETSqJ1yBJ67h54a9wg3Q/3ry/exsht6TGQyC8Q3dJWL4spA/h1/Jd426ChGfXkApQ1AyMHBqljI42CDzS2lHt_qr3fQX3U)**

[ **Donate****$5** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzC9IG0sxC6KbetZLRUH3idnF60GgtvKn8vlbg7R-xmmPdVDLAFPo0GAS4pn7bWMPareS0MBRaOog97EPLVSgdZlvAJJ7O4rnRzEgtG11gBhUrJglQ23agfCd7tpbqpgzCLlpmUmfCQphJbOcMLgPc9NJcAqq1uLAw-EvW-gXXxcox58GNzkj2wDc06nnYcqJDBmXg_s8GVtstCZZNIWLJj7xzcQ8SmcRtTKHvXKnhT5vaEpZf5GXt3HCSCXQyjB0krw58PzoiG72jZSNIlGtR4lsTg0REuPMSieVewYUjyglrgoGqD1n3NKL4E-06EsxGt9q6lSG9ZPoe6hz3Eic4O0JNSoK1By4ZP-M45ixh99P_0GoEb1svgr9mYwQTlOseA/3ry/exsht6TGQyC8Q3dJWL4spA/h2/p2X7kycVm0a33HW4af-5zkp1I5_LctRbrSMRW9yPvk4)

When the new Congress comes into session in less than a month, one of my top priorities will be defending those who put in countless hours to feed their families and support local economies in Illinois’ 17th District. I’m ready to get to work, and I’m grateful you’re joining me in this effort. Thank you, Eric

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. clean_body: | | Peter, You may have heard the news recently that railroad workers across the country planned to go on strike if Congress failed to agree on a deal to improve their working conditions and raise their pay. A deal was struck, but it was missing one crucial component that the rail unions were fighting for: paid sick leave. It’s not just railroad workers, Peter. As it stands, tens of thousands of workers in the service, construction, and farming industries still don’t get paid sick days. Every day, hard-working Americans are forced to make a tough decision between working and getting paid or taking care of their health and losing income. It’s unacceptable, and in my view, paid sick leave should not be a controversial issue. Throughout my campaign for Congress, I made it clear that I stand with workers fighting for basic benefits like sick leave. That’s why I was endorsed by the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers, the Amalgamated Transit Union, and the AFL-CIO. In Congress, I’ll do everything in my power to speak up for the workers who are so vital to our economy and our country. When the new Congress comes into session in less than a month, one of my top priorities will be defending those who put in countless hours to feed their families and support local economies in Illinois’ 17th District. I’m ready to get to work, and I’m grateful you’re joining me in this effort. Thank you, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, on Sunday, our endorsed candidate, Karen Bass, was sworn in as the first Black female mayor of Los Angeles by Vice President Kamala Harris. Yep, you read that right! This is a historic moment — for the people of Los Angeles, for Black women everywhere, and for the team here at The Collective PAC — and moments like these are exactly why we do what we do. We saw some crucial victories for Black progressive champions this year, Peter, but our work is far from finished. We need to get a head start NOW in order to put our best foot forward in 2024 and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | In times like these, our work is more important than ever, and we can’t thank you enough for your continued support of our mission. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Peter, I’m gay.

**That’s why I was proud to pass the Respect for Marriage Act (RFMA) earlier this year.**

The RFMA will require federal and state governments to protect and recognize gay marriage.

_And now, President Biden has just signed this crucial legislation into law!_ [**Peter, as a member of the LGBTQ+ community, nothing would mean more to me than your support of this critical legislation. Will you take just a few seconds to cosponsor the Respect for Marriage Act and join the fight to protect gay marriage? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55928247/383273912/-582984886?refcode=MTFC_20221213_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA5MjYzNi0yYjdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xohsBNucfA94ZpffAicRIm7nzWNDNE--F2b_HpY78Y=&emci=6fe9820d-277b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=c0092636-2b7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=18839602) | [5,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: COSPONSOR THE BILL »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55928248/383273913/-582984886?refcode=MTFC_20221213_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA5MjYzNi0yYjdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xohsBNucfA94ZpffAicRIm7nzWNDNE--F2b_HpY78Y=&emci=6fe9820d-277b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=c0092636-2b7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=18839602)

Peter, for me, this is personal. I’ve faced homophobia before. I was publicly and forcibly outed as gay when I first ran for Congress.

**I’ve lived in an America that banned gay marriage. And I’m not going back.**

We all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – _no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender._

[**So please, take 5 seconds to cosponsor the Respect for Marriage Act NOW! I’m counting on 5,000 signatures before 10AM tomorrow »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55928249/383273914/-582984886?refcode=MTFC_20221213_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA5MjYzNi0yYjdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_xohsBNucfA94ZpffAicRIm7nzWNDNE--F2b_HpY78Y=&emci=6fe9820d-277b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=c0092636-2b7b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=18839602)

And now, President Biden has just signed this crucial legislation into law! | Peter, for me, this is personal. I’ve faced homophobia before. I was publicly and forcibly outed as gay when I first ran for Congress. I’ve lived in an America that banned gay marriage. And I’m not going back. We all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender. Thank you so much, Mark | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Sharing some reflections with you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The perseverance I bring to my recovery journey is the same energy I bring to our movement to end gun violence.
#

Friends -
When I woke up this morning, I found myself reflecting on my journey, and I hope you’ll allow me to share some thoughts with you.
My life was altered nearly 12 years ago when a gunman tried to take my life at what should have been a chance to interact with my constituents.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=1&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)
The bullet damaged the left hemisphere of my brain, where the language function sits. Nobody was sure if I’d ever be able to walk or talk again. But with a lot of hard work and determination, I’ve defied the odds and am able to do things nobody thought would be possible.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=2&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)
It’s been a challenge, but I’ve never given up on my recovery. I dedicate myself to physical therapy, speech therapy, and even yoga. Because even though the actions of a gunman have made it more difficult for me to speak, I have so much to say.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=3&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)
The perseverance I bring to my recovery journey is the same energy I bring to our movement to end gun violence.
The gun lobby will try to drown us out. They will use their lies, money, and influence. But we have something special. We have a movement filled with people like you—people who are ready to change the status quo because they are sick and tired of seeing lives lost due to our nation’s gun violence epidemic.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=4&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)
Change is all around us in the movement to end gun violence. This year, Congress passed the most significant gun safety legislation in decades. During the midterm elections, we elected leaders up and down the ballot with the courage to act. Although the strides we’ve made towards a future free from gun violence are significant, we must keep moving forward. There’s still a lot more work to be done.
It’s the supporters like you who make our work possible. And a large part of that support is the grassroots donations people make to fuel our work.
[**So please, can I count on you to make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can to support Giffords today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=5&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec22.jP9tfI&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=6&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cw1qcH&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=7&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec22.7SXY6R&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=8&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec22.EeXQyB&refcode=em221213-1-15-r&t=9&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e)**
---

Thank you for all that you do to stand with me in the movement to end gun violence.
With courage,
Gabby

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2858%2E3935704%2EAPu89e) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Do you remember Joe Lieberman?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Back in the day, Kyrsten Sinema had some choice things to say about Joe Lieberman: _"He's a shame to Democrats. I don't even know why he's running. He seems to want to get Republicans voting for him — what kind of strategy is that?"_ Hmm, sounds like someone else we know?! **** **[Chip in now to replace Sinema in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcEtoqeJUD_hh4bwC3hq-9wJ45H28PWpG6zUi5U-tBkjBFWNWg1apM6lSnPYYq88n3aDUsWijq1pOeutmGjC1TcJTk4VdiXz0wnTZeHGIhC5XT9yv7F3GpaFYcL6-2xeNTbtplMvEyYuKlMrOguDuGWILbvKxidsz6gBUFWfgwD1UYpR5afw4V-bOE4JVr2xnU_EJe5UpX5owXfgMA3QBv7bmuRx_IYo38LlBTIQsUrjEUuB1MPFN8HZBuIrIgTUf2/3ry/6hfLtuIZQYKBi3GjkVG0gg/h0/hpXgGRRPS4uAqo-1vyP_TJk2ulyP88bgkiHUNJmNDQc)** Sinema’s announcement that she quit the Democratic Party comes after she spent YEARS breaking the promises she ran on to get elected. It’s a slap in the face to every volunteer and voter who worked for her victory. Arizona voted for two Democrats in the Senate, and that’s what we’re going to make sure they get back. We’re not going to lie – it won’t be easy. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Join the Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the corruption of our nation’s educational system.

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc013f2f7b0b40b180cfd2e61da20b97&_e=YP_gCCvenalQe-Ih-v9R69VQkAIBnIgdAxdSHMmlmOye--iYtC5G9hqq6pkmXDdvWh_8wuT-9icMn1mI0plR-_y6txu8UTfyFSavJHIAqMi1z-zyTaSm7aqYbAgsopUQfUDW6oRACDUnJRzilgNfw26TkH8yAVSv7oS5sFGBs_diiBMrsK1U-NtIf8Kl9hYezP23zjddirrLIjVOK_OZTqrCgCilX9LEzOtRI4qViT3wcV4yJNRx0H-EDHm4ypmCFuajCPkd9rl05tmqAf13Yybvdzur1J-9CvCYpLDrmVs2HKZSPp83qixu8EmqeiewI7fy7HBm0gJcRax3Y0czJYzmrR52NfTBGMlCyth5iyXj-6XMevcsSHzvHsO_4JT8)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc013f2f7b0b40b180cfd2e61da20b97&_e=YP_gCCvenalQe-Ih-v9R69VQkAIBnIgdAxdSHMmlmOye--iYtC5G9hqq6pkmXDdvWh_8wuT-9icMn1mI0plR-_y6txu8UTfyFSavJHIAqMi1z-zyTaSm7aqYbAgsopUQfUDW6oRACDUnJRzilgNfw26TkH8yAVSv7oS5sFGBs_diiBMrsK1U-NtIf8Kl9hYezP23zjddirrLIjVOK_OZTqrCgCilX9LEzOtRI4qViT3_lFXkiHJjq8951Gx-Adw-3vMdkB7DaHePewtI4rCCtyzBlQEeGIBcCyupodK8CbRcvqxL-iuHDRnIuM4Z2G7GxHS9DUKAFmCuhmmi_5yLrC5CFphgSzD4InI8aCBhPS7g35dXqDNx2QILQwjJRNHk)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc013f2f7b0b40b180cfd2e61da20b97&_e=YP_gCCvenalQe-Ih-v9R69VQkAIBnIgdAxdSHMmlmOye--iYtC5G9hqq6pkmXDdvWh_8wuT-9icMn1mI0plR-_y6txu8UTfyFSavJHIAqMi1z-zyTaSm7aqYbAgsopUQfUDW6oRACDUnJRzilgNfw26TkH8yAVSv7oS5sFGBs_diiBMrsK1U-NtIf8Kl9hYezP23zjddirrLIjVOK_OZTqrCgCilX9LEzOtRI4qViT1jv-4CLjWALZtIzPAoiB9oZ4oB4qb7upL2LGmY-vc-oS_yZzLvA2kVFhIrcb5PDk9k0a8krvkJP1Voh8lPb8EZXDHHGDnQ6h1Vl3gA-ea16ACh85rB3JIQZDFq6o6JhwKL4NG1X9fK5WHcwKZt1Qhv)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc013f2f7b0b40b180cfd2e61da20b97&_e=YP_gCCvenalQe-Ih-v9R69VQkAIBnIgdAxdSHMmlmOye--iYtC5G9hqq6pkmXDdvWh_8wuT-9icMn1mI0plR-_y6txu8UTfyFSavJHIAqMi1z-zyTaSm7aqYbAgsopUQfUDW6oRACDUnJRzilgNfw26TkH8yAVSv7oS5sFGBs_diiBMrsK1U-NtIf8Kl9hYezP23zjddirrLIjVOK_OZTqrCgCilX9LEzOtRI4qViT2dM-9kLIrOMAfZqNrMfiqUwEMleY8PkczMNqMEo6iD-bi1zIlGajecmDaG2RD01msMULVMDlb5CMG6mg5aNiJTCX-BFup-vlgh44Am7NVy6g9EDw-e1-RxuKuyA7LBwmCR72Mn9HKDrT6TDM_4A1EZ)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=fc013f2f7b0b40b180cfd2e61da20b97&_t=I2YlhZFP5gwKmrtw4GonBtv0LvA0ZH_ZIUc9fEvxrJ827R7VGj699hP5VV1DCDv23etzKwHEgqgtTjQG7nAo92L7rCM4HmmPmkm56dh9U0ZVQfpc-3J0_R_7GdWQrBv_nrX8cxzbVAEKoEYLnpcp6YfAYW8r_lf88UOA_FPmEO0%3D)

But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions in 2023. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making . Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please support the project today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Evergreen
subject: We’re dropping petitions at the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Join us as we call on Biden to #StopWillow
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4399?t=2&akid=13150%2E53494%2EEKBnmE) Friend, we've got the petitions and we're dropping them off. More than 21,000 Evergreen followers have signed on to tell President Biden he must reject ConocoPhillips' proposed Willow Project in Alaska's western Arctic. And together with partners from across the movement, we plan to hand deliver over 100,000 signatures to the White House this Thursday. **Will you join us in DC and help send the message that Biden must block the single largest oil extraction project currently proposed on public lands?** **Where:** Lafayette Square, Pennsylvania Ave NW & 16th St NW
**When:** Thursday, December 15 at 12:30 PM EST | [RSVP here](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4399?t=3&akid=13150%2E53494%2EEKBnmE)
---
The Willow Project would lock us into three decades of destructive drilling in sensitive Arctic ecosystems near Indigenous communities. It would unleash devastating levels of pollution and directly undermine Biden's climate goals. We hope you'll join us as we head to the White House to demand an end to this disastrous plan.
[RSVP for DC Rally
to Stop Willow](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4399?t=4&akid=13150%2E53494%2EEKBnmE)
---
We hope to see you there,
Team Evergreen

name: Team NextGen
subject: LGBTQ+ rights just became stronger.
body:
| | Friend, **Our right to same-sex marriage is now federal law. ** President Biden just took historic action and signed the bipartisan Respect for Marriage Act into law — **meaning our right to same-sex marriage is much safer.** Because of leadership from Democrats in Congress, activists, and voters such as yourself, the LGBTQ+ community and interracial couples can live with the certainty that they can marry who they love. **But our work is not done.** GOP leaders will continue to threaten the rights of the LGBTQ+ community, so we’ve got to keep up our fight. [Volunteer with us now to ensure LGBTQ+ freedoms and rights are not only protected but expanded.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55929010/383278092/-424764474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTliMzU4MS0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNj0SdhBoCGs4JdjKaBwTTnhejkd_Qj3pmvzIlylDp8=&emci=a6ac5173-7c76-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=999b3581-317b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=6787172) The Respect for Marriage Act is even more evidence of the power that young voters hold. Young people showed up to vote in progressives up and down the ballot this election season, and we’re now seeing them show up for us in Congress. And while this bill is a step in the right direction, there’s still much more to be done. Congress must continue to fight for LGBTQ+ rights across the board. There’s more we can do. President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929122/383278366/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=&emci=b8151111-ff7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=04f55c8d-317b-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43402272) | It’s official, Peter: **President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law! ** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929124/383278367/763742555?refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)** At a time when LGBTQ+ people, especially LGBTQ+ kids, are under attack, and when the Supreme Court is on the brink of endorsing discrimination based on _who you are_ , _this achievement is especially consequential_. The story of this country, and the march towards equality, is not a straight line, but it is more important than ever to celebrate progress when it comes. After decades of struggle and sacrifice by millions of Americans fighting for marriage equality, this legislation FINALLY codifies same-sex and interracial marriages into federal law. **Now,_all_ couples can rest assured that their right to marry whoever they love will be protected – even if the Supreme Court were to overturn the right to marriage guaranteed by the _Obergefell_ decision. ** As the first openly LGBTQ+ woman to represent Vermont in Congress, this day means so much to me. When my wife Elizabeth and I were first married, we had to have the Justice of the Peace perform a Civil Union because Civil Marriage for same-sex couples was not yet legal in Vermont. To see how far not just Vermont but the entire country has come since then makes me so proud. **In honor of this historic milestone for our nation, I’m holding a joint fundraiser with Senator Tammy Baldwin, the first openly LGBTQ+ woman to be elected to both the House AND the Senate.[Will you split a donation between me and Tammy Baldwin today to celebrate the signing of the Respect for Marriage Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929126/383278368/763742555?refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929128/383278372/763742555?express_lane=true&refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-EG-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929129/383278373/763742555?express_lane=true&refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-EG-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)**

We all know that _there is still a lot more work we need to do to ensure LGBTQ+ people have full equality under the law_. **Nearly half of U.S. states lack basic protections for LGBTQ+ people** – and with a disturbing rise in anti-LGBTQ+ legislation popping up across the country, we need to work harder than ever to secure _all_ of our rights.
During my time in the Vermont State Senate, I fought for LGBTQ+ rights by helping to ban “conversion therapy” and advocating for the gender-inclusive bathroom bill on the Senate floor. Now, I plan on continuing that work on the federal level in Congress. [**Will you split a donation between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign to help us continue the fight for LGBTQ+ protections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929136/383278381/763742555?refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)
| **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929137/383278382/763742555?refcode=E19782-20221213-RespectForMarriageActSigned-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGY1NWM4ZC0zMTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KJLK9zFNBxtmz1Ca2qQeCG-sOUTo2vuxbwKWecAihI=)**

clean_body: President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act! | | It’s official, Peter: President Biden just signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law! = At a time when LGBTQ+ people, especially LGBTQ+ kids, are under attack, and when the Supreme Court is on the brink of endorsing discrimination based on who you are , this achievement is especially consequential. The story of this country, and the march towards equality, is not a straight line, but it is more important than ever to celebrate progress when it comes. After decades of struggle and sacrifice by millions of Americans fighting for marriage equality, this legislation FINALLY codifies same-sex and interracial marriages into federal law. Now,all couples can rest assured that their right to marry whoever they love will be protected – even if the Supreme Court were to overturn the right to marriage guaranteed by the Obergefell decision. As the first openly LGBTQ+ woman to represent Vermont in Congress, this day means so much to me. When my wife Elizabeth and I were first married, we had to have the Justice of the Peace perform a Civil Union because Civil Marriage for same-sex couples was not yet legal in Vermont. To see how far not just Vermont but the entire country has come since then makes me so proud. In honor of this historic milestone for our nation, I’m holding a joint fundraiser with Senator Tammy Baldwin, the first openly LGBTQ+ woman to be elected to both the House AND the Senate.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We all know that there is still a lot more work we need to do to ensure LGBTQ+ people have full equality under the law. Nearly half of U.S. states lack basic protections for LGBTQ+ people – and with a disturbing rise in anti-LGBTQ+ legislation popping up across the country, we need to work harder than ever to secure all of our rights. During my time in the Vermont State Senate, I fought for LGBTQ+ rights by helping to ban “conversion therapy” and advocating for the gender-inclusive bathroom bill on the Senate floor. Now, I plan on continuing that work on the federal level in Congress. = | = ---|--- Thank you, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. |
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=222c24ff7e474ecc88f88cf8d57708db&_e=in8_wl9WQc8JczJmvsLo8oKaZOsxxqzH-O6L4KKKWbMKxt0TTpVId94f6o2KJrk3xmSWzJBHA-TF-5CfeKJImQyZ_A1dEBQ3UpxIRn1lBv2VKLYVu7523aThGcW7Fc-G1KPTQE1aGg2A_t7m-z8c8-7Lmx6d98ZpS3z2HEJdKUzM5I11lfncgeXX05fPykpgGR_OYTynbutckhyc3QebHACOPihTxN4vJPeCYf_KKQh_Tf-GjBW5e4rreXDsakN8DqageopG6lvry8WJFnJAeOal8-TWMpuGRLOcXg7044AkUkNDwzz4p4-jI-R4vwdwKymNbGUKeAhqwfySHtcPq6OI4MmjLrTma5B5eX2b6PVcgbiSb2d75pHfFLE5lWKe)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=222c24ff7e474ecc88f88cf8d57708db&_e=in8_wl9WQc8JczJmvsLo8oKaZOsxxqzH-O6L4KKKWbMKxt0TTpVId94f6o2KJrk3xmSWzJBHA-TF-5CfeKJImQyZ_A1dEBQ3UpxIRn1lBv2VKLYVu7523aThGcW7Fc-G1KPTQE1aGg2A_t7m-z8c8-7Lmx6d98ZpS3z2HEJdKUzM5I11lfncgeXX05fPykpgGR_OYTynbutckhyc3QebHACOPihTxN4vJPeCYf_KKQi-egTwwRI4N3Mx9PBOuuTLaAP4ykIXaa489NF81uyNMeAQbn4NhjYKPrQ2__-WbPcC561SDnhDoFSH3rckO-KadPz1tJUKEJuY1jkDnGnR7mFQItPPBYlQKSvR0jBa-2ZBY4QoSgYqCkvg11ecQ5eC) I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=222c24ff7e474ecc88f88cf8d57708db&_e=in8_wl9WQc8JczJmvsLo8oKaZOsxxqzH-O6L4KKKWbMKxt0TTpVId94f6o2KJrk3xmSWzJBHA-TF-5CfeKJImQyZ_A1dEBQ3UpxIRn1lBv2VKLYVu7523aThGcW7Fc-G1KPTQE1aGg2A_t7m-z8c8-7Lmx6d98ZpS3z2HEJdKUzM5I11lfncgeXX05fPykpgGR_OYTynbutckhyc3QebHACOPihTxN4vJPeCYf_KKQg_R9lMCuXgGaBu6Mq0cAB6YQ19qmlbAnfgmlzEAtr5YU_zlw9eW3qOM7UPXfuWdPYg-foOJmNAw9_Xjq9YIndVIJlKbM8GDTqeGo6S9GdhtaiaYSZ1K1Ay40A8iBSHQXx7M3xp5NPhuuzHM8YHDkg_) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Today we made history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, today we made history. **The President signed the _Respect for Marriage Act_ into law, a critical victory for same-sex and interracial couples across the country.** We introduced this bill after the Supreme Court’s decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ because we recognized how important it is to codify protections we all share, including marriage equality, in federal law. It’s been a busy couple of months, and I am incredibly proud to see our hard work pay off once again. Our historic legislation provides marriage protections under the law for all couples. _To all the members of our team: thank you for putting your trust in our work. With your help, same-sex couples all across the country will be able to live a life filled with love, devotion, and family just like all married Americans._ Let’s continue to work hard to bring families the protection and support they need for years to come. Thank you for being a part of this team, Kyrsten | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55929729/383280750/-450372942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_KLS_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20221213_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJmMGJjOS0zNTdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I4xwgEdf0Is3UZl1z9Tsvn0EuHqhrRadwQZaY6tLNAc=)

clean_body: | Team, today we made history. The President signed the Respect for Marriage Act into law, a critical victory for same-sex and interracial couples across the country. We introduced this bill after the Supreme Court’s decision overturning Roe v. Wade because we recognized how important it is to codify protections we all share, including marriage equality, in federal law. It’s been a busy couple of months, and I am incredibly proud to see our hard work pay off once again. Our historic legislation provides marriage protections under the law for all couples. To all the members of our team: thank you for putting your trust in our work. With your help, same-sex couples all across the country will be able to live a life filled with love, devotion, and family just like all married Americans. Let’s continue to work hard to bring families the protection and support they need for years to come. Thank you for being a part of this team, Kyrsten | = Sinema for Arizona P.O. Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586 United States | mailto:info@kyrstensinema.com | | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona

Team,
Republican politicians have launched an all-out assault against our public libraries. If we let them get away with it, they will cause irreversible damage.
Specifically, the GOP wants to ban books that don’t conform with their radical world view. This includes anything from LGBTQ+ rights to Black history – no topic is off limits.
If we let them go unchecked, our public libraries will be transformed from beacons of free speech to Republican-censored book stores.
Listen, you’re one of the 4 people we need to hear from in 18326. Fellow American, Do you have the _**courage**_ to do what's right? Over the last few years, _**An America United **_has built a coalition of bright, common sense, courageous leaders who have the _**courage**_ to stand up for our country and against the extreme performative politics that we see all too often in Washington, D.C. Our national leaders are the very definition of the word...
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=3c3c3ff1397e4925b9a8f0a4188a1be7&_e=LUQMyynoRV-37iOrjj_yHE64jK8k4EDQiHgTVmZGK-8dhYMAah9J1JZIwnYM_zBjqgbcBTr8RRBVQIJMM-D550dZ49I7oaypv4-xfoW1bm6IUbOS4UhDWd_4bDic-Uuffuds4_CZ-YoDqCacfFX9FFIaMWT6iRJw78x5GRaVI2zC9whZ6FO6QQMBBWxIiAjGKWLx1QNRvkzFYL8Ee-Dj-qXCSjuF6JaT3GaiP_x6WZGhtrhpC1iHpj6K1XiKTGwTP6fsZ9SDP1y0blHSOA0Xsg%3D%3D)

| | America is split into partisan factions – and while it does take _**courage**_ to stand up to the other side, it takes far more to stand up to those who should be our allies but are dragging the party of Ronald Reagan in a dangerous direction. Common sense, conservative solutions can win if we cut through the antics and focus on the needs of the people. If Governor Larry Hogan can do it in deep-blue Maryland, we can do it anywhere. [**Please help us grow this movement and contribute $10, $25, $55 or more today and stand with An America United.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=3c3c3ff1397e4925b9a8f0a4188a1be7&_e=LUQMyynoRV-37iOrjj_yHE64jK8k4EDQiHgTVmZGK-8dhYMAah9J1JZIwnYM_zBjqgbcBTr8RRBVQIJMM-D550dZ49I7oaypv4-xfoW1bm7HyYuyUbyfj2LZRVXsA_MATGRRjczOToWK7Yw-EVy_7DUCOYxb9ld2CYuGoOxW7Q4ypf_zJyvlQAdHEJV9HN4ib-JCK5Lk1wmL9EvXj1RdG433mBI9aSS6N_sJhNi3qtIYU1gDtVKaRRDevV2BNXlKfiCOq6Gk1UXUA3lq47ejeA%3D%3D) Let's be courageous together.

_**Team An America United **_

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Do you have the courage to do what's right? Over the last few years, An America United has built a coalition of bright, common sense, courageous leaders who have the courage to stand up for our country and against the extreme performative politics that we see all too often in Washington, D.C. Our national leaders are the very definition of the word... | | | | America is split into partisan factions – and while it does take courage to stand up to the other side, it takes far more to stand up to those who should be our allies but are dragging the party of Ronald Reagan in a dangerous direction. Common sense, conservative solutions can win if we cut through the antics and focus on the needs of the people. If Governor Larry Hogan can do it in deep-blue Maryland, we can do it anywhere. Let's be courageous together. Thank you, Team An America United | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55930003/383281546/-1069438538?refcode=221213TurnoutProblem_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxOTQ2OTBlLTM4N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8lGGa00rkin2BY8Rj_s2pLo5b4hNVKf4ivcY1C6J2JY=)
| Fellow activist, there’s been a lot of news since the election, but we want to make sure you didn’t miss this bombshell: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55930004/383281547/-1069438538?refcode=221213TurnoutProblem_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxOTQ2OTBlLTM4N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8lGGa00rkin2BY8Rj_s2pLo5b4hNVKf4ivcY1C6J2JY=) **Philadelphia’s voter turnout plummeted 33% from 2020 levels this election and reached its lowest share of Pennsylvania’s vote in two decades. Had the city followed the statewide average of 22%, 84,000 more votes would have been cast.**

Make no mistake. This is no natural or random variation — these drops were the sharpest in historically disenfranchised and neglected communities of color and immigrant communities.

**[This shows exactly why our work is so important. Overcoming centuries of suppression and neglect takes serious investment and year-round work. Can you chip in $10 today to help us expand the electorate to reflect our demographically changing population?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55930005/383281548/-1069438538?refcode=221213TurnoutProblem_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxOTQ2OTBlLTM4N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8lGGa00rkin2BY8Rj_s2pLo5b4hNVKf4ivcY1C6J2JY=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55930006/383281549/-1069438538?refcode=221213TurnoutProblem_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxOTQ2OTBlLTM4N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8lGGa00rkin2BY8Rj_s2pLo5b4hNVKf4ivcY1C6J2JY=) It’s not all bad news, though, fellow activist. As the article mentions, both Philly’s suburbs and Allegheny County, both of which were a part of our centered regions in 2022, actually increased their shares of votes cast in the state.

Where we invest in the year-round work it takes to expand the electorate, it pays off. NPP will expand our efforts to include Philadelphia in 2023.

**[Fellow activist, the takeaways from this news are clear. The future of our state depends on engaging historically disenfranchised communities — and in just our first full year of work, we’ve proven our ability to do it. Will you donate $10 right now to help us keep expanding Pennsylvania’s electorate and our staff?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55930007/383281550/-1069438538?refcode=221213TurnoutProblem_N_TEAM_90DO_6_G_N_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxOTQ2OTBlLTM4N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8lGGa00rkin2BY8Rj_s2pLo5b4hNVKf4ivcY1C6J2JY=)** clean_body: = | Fellow activist, there’s been a lot of news since the election, but we want to make sure you didn’t miss this bombshell: = Philadelphia’s voter turnout plummeted 33% from 2020 levels this election and reached its lowest share of Pennsylvania’s vote in two decades. Had the city followed the statewide average of 22%, 84,000 more votes would have been cast. Make no mistake. This is no natural or random variation — these drops were the sharpest in historically disenfranchised and neglected communities of color and immigrant communities. = = It’s not all bad news, though, fellow activist. As the article mentions, both Philly’s suburbs and Allegheny County, both of which were a part of our centered regions in 2022, actually increased their shares of votes cast in the state. Where we invest in the year-round work it takes to expand the electorate, it pays off. NPP will expand our efforts to include Philadelphia in 2023. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. We had an incredible year together:

**We defeated one of the most entrenched and extreme politicians** in the country, in a race many thought impossible to win.

**We came together** as Democrats, Republicans, and Independents to move our country forward and work together to make real progress.

**And we did it by being honest with you** in fundraising emails like this one. We were clear about our race, our finances, and what we needed to win.

So as our team looks to the road ahead, we need to be upfront about the reality of running for Congress. We’re counting on folks like you to step up and ensure OH-01 stays blue.

We can 't let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. **** Thank you, SCOTUS ALERTS Sent via Team Scalise Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stop the anti-life movement
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1edd2a7ba5e7498881ddf1bba46e77a4&_e=Lq74etfnkyETMD1OvDxbSNHX1Br9OJxHDAqfZREE60pv5z12SzRa1GeQZTSCp2oSEY7Q24TUduxMMMKCx0trvSFfA7ZHtcG_Zgnv9hr8VFaBLsMlJPx4tF6xqmaMoWrU97aARqTORzihBBH2IGpGyNfjZgWrYzIuzbAwIt4W9p5f-xEfmj1UIMqGeseVQck8VFQ8X_brglfGZ27hqb2oMxngUUvqybRdAup3IverBfO_rVchooamswK-tX_xpQxlpMilJQK_lSHlf8UXt_e9QHf35l0U8RQr162vcSABjZQEVcADFgwsbnrO5wtSksk2Zh2p-2QAAyi2GurRUAfThmxDU54-lxNomI_im8Pt6s5JIabWcBeZ3CfKjnaDFuTT)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1edd2a7ba5e7498881ddf1bba46e77a4&_e=Lq74etfnkyETMD1OvDxbSNHX1Br9OJxHDAqfZREE60pv5z12SzRa1GeQZTSCp2oSEY7Q24TUduxMMMKCx0trvSFfA7ZHtcG_Zgnv9hr8VFaBLsMlJPx4tF6xqmaMoWrU97aARqTORzihBBH2IGpGyNfjZgWrYzIuzbAwIt4W9p5f-xEfmj1UIMqGeseVQck8VFQ8X_brglfGZ27hqb2oMxngUUvqybRdAup3IverBfMUKko3AywE3TwAH6PYIeqvgj0gbZN6p9lnveR4wDMMYH7lUlooFhPgxA-tCYda9hzx5ecyuIQ7s1rzBSGRd4yCV-5Yo8bIk4uNyb4W9_H_DqHsHmn5FmiOxALe43gxnXGf8AxYhADavO7GU-SKjVbz) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1edd2a7ba5e7498881ddf1bba46e77a4&_e=Lq74etfnkyETMD1OvDxbSNHX1Br9OJxHDAqfZREE60pv5z12SzRa1GeQZTSCp2oSEY7Q24TUduxMMMKCx0trvSFfA7ZHtcG_Zgnv9hr8VFaBLsMlJPx4tF6xqmaMoWrU97aARqTORzihBBH2IGpGyNfjZgWrYzIuzbAwIt4W9p5f-xEfmj1UIMqGeseVQck8VFQ8X_brglfGZ27hqb2oMxngUUvqybRdAup3IverBfMsfZ_NR-OEhv4SZHhkK3Y1_P_a9wPACg-dnSCWu0Xd-F0lMHSR4e73K5jtSXhqP14s_1kMhWNfXo3eHfLRVIqGNrrquUXjsoPJZK8Y4kTKiSnlpGxK4GjkXHrV-mNx-4yxwMk5dQFiviEvsdeRbVAM) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Friend,

**THANK YOU! **

subject: 1 year ago today

body:
We launched this campaign for Congress one year ago today
Peter: On December 13th, 2021, we launched what many called a “ _longshot_ ” campaign to win Vermont’s lone congressional seat. Exactly one year to the day, _I am now your Congresswoman-elect_.
On launch day, Vermonters from all walks of life showed up to support me – raising a mind-boggling $125,000 on Day One. This early support was critical to our success, and immediately went towards hiring campaign staff, opening field offices, recruiting volunteers, and reaching the diverse coalition of voters that propelled our campaign to victory on November 8th.
I am so grateful for all of you who have been on this journey with me. At the one-year mark, I feel stronger than ever in my conviction that the campaign we have built together is going to make a huge impact for our state under the next Congress.
I cannot emphasize enough how lucky I am to be in this with you. This powerful grassroots team will be key in helping me fight the righteous fights, take on the status quo, and push for real, progressive change in Washington. In honor of one year of this campaign, will you contribute $10, $27, or even just $1 to help us hit our mid-month goal on the 15th?
Here's the link to contribute: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Dec2022-FR-December](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55932015/383288239/137396421?refcode=E19783-20221213-1YearAnniversary-SL-CampaignNews-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWYxYmE0My00MjdiLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DcUi-LO_oxQ2hFZ8FeMz6yycOcwZndsAh2STDUOP6iE=)
Thank you for all that you do,
Becca Balint

clean_body: We launched this campaign for Congress one year ago today Peter: On December 13th, 2021, we launched what many called a “ longshot ” campaign to win Vermont’s lone congressional seat. Exactly one year to the day, I am now your Congresswoman-elect. On launch day, Vermonters from all walks of life showed up to support me – raising a mind-boggling $125,000 on Day One. This early support was critical to our success, and immediately went towards hiring campaign staff, opening field offices, recruiting volunteers, and reaching the diverse coalition of voters that propelled our campaign to victory on November 8th. I am so grateful for all of you who have been on this journey with me. At the one-year mark, I feel stronger than ever in my conviction that the campaign we have built together is going to make a huge impact for our state under the next Congress. I cannot emphasize enough how lucky I am to be in this with you. This powerful grassroots team will be key in helping me fight the righteous fights, take on the status quo, and push for real, progressive change in Washington. In honor of one year of this campaign, will you contribute $10, $27, or even just $1 to help us hit our mid-month goal on the 15th? Here's the link to contribute: = Thank you for all that you do, Becca Balint Paid for by Becca for Congress.

name: Court Defenders
subject: Can We Trust Our Courts?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
The woke mob is coming for our courts| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkRoGaQoZpHdx94na6tYGS4GfB_lmIai1A_kkEz5pJaOf_0098p9C8sXt5CjfVsBJbxg_oORbQf_XlXGxY3lgcPt70iBgaxkmHedmvxMRBRL6fGCmNSYGi1J9WScjsELz7N5Y0IqDbIsobxMdXavyMrSUsiHdBB0IVHlFuNUCI0Jiw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, The Left kept control of the Senate. They still control the White House. Can it get any worse for conservatives? **_Yes, it can get worse — because the Left is coming after our courts next._** We can't let them capture every branch of our government. Once the woke mob has control of our courts, the far Left intends to use that power to enforce their radical agenda without ever winning a single vote. The radical left will use the courts to:
* Strip parents of their rights to raise their children as they see fit,
* Dismantle your 2nd amendment rights,
* _And attack any of your constitutional rights that get in the way of their agenda._

---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkRXCrRE2zLu0fNo8Fn8vRPUOHqeA2NTq0rxoTE4pkXRonw71ydJubdMGQzn7fDyltxKgvN85OxNQed2g3IDV5y4AikG-R6fDk4-CXp5qG-67xr18S5uUCYD8RVSO3i5gud9eNph1b7KShLk2o6QqIVPFfi3LWQWjAJS0RA4GguaYg%3D%3D)
---
| | We know this is their goal, because they have done it before, creating a right to legal abortion on demand with _Roe v. Wade._
**But** _**Roe****v.****Wade**_**teaches us something important: We CAN fight back against judicial activism.**_**And when we fight back, we can WIN. **_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkR5L1vZLBJaLCG6YhQAhgMn2NNem9hlGuipagGH7in_IlRrDOCAEt3HW9kwbomdV0RTPnvuS-jsP9bLPn4sbdnFoYjczO1_CxeTSb9Pkz0QVzJJzYlzIdPQgYtwDEIGvA01Ef-lLR9KQiqUuVcm276Rh9xxUmet5HiAfwRX4L3qDg%3D%3D)
---
As a well-informed conservative, you’ve heard of judicial activism before — but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. Peter, that’s simply not true. It happens at EVERY level of the judiciary. And that’s why**Fair Courts America** exists. **Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor.** So when the Pennsylvania Supreme Court decides to amend the state constitution by decree and change how elections are run, __we’re there to fight back._ _ When liberal prosecutors in red states decide to thwart the will of the people by declaring they will decline to enforce pro-life legislation, __we won’t let them get away with it.__**
****And when the Left tries to pack the Supreme Court,****____we won’t let them change the rules of our republic.__**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkTk5In0ufi6yIABcWr1gdHGV6CzeNYF3DR05fc07cG8wuXIrnYtKKEPNnBJUpf8s0wwnD-cGi3d6vyVdD8RT4RjXmK89zDbosK-SDnFKGzRbF4J28Hnrd3btnAZs2rlOh8pwPb0Y7-OGmJdVf0HklPp9CG2Ub0wCaN3oNNRHZ-kDw%3D%3D)
---
Tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — but it is absolutely critical to protecting our republic. [**Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from total takeover: YOU.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkQyX0LCdcao6gbUC_fnHtEMEFd6WfoEU_4raEIonpiAfpzaCMvvV1eoF7zQZFZdUAuaSIVH9jS_nJ1fh-PfuJm-FcltP1MiCfeLJ5MG6XrlRWCKLw9cn0sWJxtEkLfuiWiggi8w0mwk4A2ltSPR1vZy0X0hRtQ4ULlttHTeJ-skTQ%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=36dee8f03b444b4e85f3ccfda7bae3d1&_e=5NFiLgWE4N85ai9jGNOuXHLAQ5eNor6_N3fgUZadHkRTRK6-6aEmDqQywzpajkKezogrV0kz79uYCoYuXz9HBbvKgjd0E7hEu5hwIEqjCneoU32T2rncCf3BXCTWc45_e4zua9dgQ0eWQhD2BI-rfsRse72B1bfB1VlYQBvXMd13T-3_FzKfS527DWcr0BoqoDOmMkWm7n2L9SaHdwkZPA%3D%3D)
---
In justice,Fair Courts America
