subject: Do you believe America has strayed from Christian principles?
body:
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acdf8647e4a44494982d38950c74c198&_e=5rx9c_Z3Ib1py7cYhdKIh6KrLA9qklv94V8tX3QYaPrt5KxnVzA1zbZXw_R1-j0l7Y_s4bd0t1thTeyArzJMJ8LsGeNOoZkgXAxqtblLP5Bu2uJz73sg1upbZ7QplgPmaUh-NW4qdzF5jeUmXO6BrOKSaZ2gPXAzdT4MQWqKsnC7hkkEufaYFP6BXBxqdRx5a5uCctFuSZxLHXrB2Vf6xZ22OcK5-XAZYavlJSmy30VlYI4HHElQtbMy8aC_opY0uzN0qgz38tVgnnWYxcGCOCdvxDCejhqO1Ivt5NCB8hkjcynF3xoSN_GTdg7gRs5qEJQexQYND0MSWr9KZF4VxCUjXDvNpobX7waGEXjPrdLcNpflwQDOJ_CtkM-XvZeLngJL2HqNFyhd2qw6wNEP_A%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_" I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth--that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'"_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acdf8647e4a44494982d38950c74c198&_e=5rx9c_Z3Ib1py7cYhdKIh6KrLA9qklv94V8tX3QYaPrt5KxnVzA1zbZXw_R1-j0l7Y_s4bd0t1thTeyArzJMJ8LsGeNOoZkgXAxqtblLP5Bu2uJz73sg1upbZ7QplgPmaUh-NW4qdzF5jeUmXO6BrOKSaZ2gPXAzdT4MQWqKsnC7hkkEufaYFP6BXBxqdRx5a5uCctFuSZxLHXrB2Vf6xZ22OcK5-XAZYavlJSmy30VlYI4HHElQtbMy8aC_opY0jprueha8hX1O1GM3JHxmZWDZ_C00bfVhkVS-8zzQQOqa_5en51EHS_2_hY7QBZWZjgckzKEJr9b_VEMRnH4wuLyc7o3UvxoVqZdoot8n8UYchNJ6R3Nwo-pKzild7tHPDZJFqYy2Pcn8lcdixmcnoQ%3D%3D)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acdf8647e4a44494982d38950c74c198&_e=5rx9c_Z3Ib1py7cYhdKIh6KrLA9qklv94V8tX3QYaPrt5KxnVzA1zbZXw_R1-j0l7Y_s4bd0t1thTeyArzJMJ8LsGeNOoZkgXAxqtblLP5Bu2uJz73sg1upbZ7QplgPmaUh-NW4qdzF5jeUmXO6BrOKSaZ2gPXAzdT4MQWqKsnC7hkkEufaYFP6BXBxqdRx5a5uCctFuSZxLHXrB2Vf6xZ22OcK5-XAZYavlJSmy30VlYI4HHElQtbMy8aC_opY0izPwa-DbznaATDNxZzY9CEC069j8QVctyzXqfK5uDziJAfCWAbM6xh2uNetMHV9NbXq_i5h4VegjEaSqvN8ELnAf985A4IbnG8BnERRPlhIX8Xt_xn2A39B5CitKFsqDAi0WNQLZmLiHkf6d9OOHbg%3D%3D)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acdf8647e4a44494982d38950c74c198&_e=5rx9c_Z3Ib1py7cYhdKIh6KrLA9qklv94V8tX3QYaPrt5KxnVzA1zbZXw_R1-j0l7Y_s4bd0t1thTeyArzJMJ8LsGeNOoZkgXAxqtblLP5Bu2uJz73sg1upbZ7QplgPmaUh-NW4qdzF5jeUmXO6BrOKSaZ2gPXAzdT4MQWqKsnC7hkkEufaYFP6BXBxqdRx5a5uCctFuSZxLHXrB2Vf6xZ22OcK5-XAZYavlJSmy30VlYI4HHElQtbMy8aC_opY0PFn3QKxDV7k0mz_xS7I0Zi7qNWM7B-TrNgrwO2w_t7cam4-dM5-DBCckrYdPR_764_6RXdoVAxo2qlPE-3IS-gvmlBh8UwXR_pYori1BQ1aDqrUJeO4wWo_jFyYMMsD80i2sOEGsJzc42CqceLK-0A%3D%3D)** There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What 's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I 've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5928f5bfbcc94d8aa3c4112340df0051&_e=KyuMWctJ8yc0WTp9rO6m90QHnUOpZFoD6vZ4gVpPBwUL78iQy89AhqDfay7h7PmWLuXL6WBdOeHyI6YQeH0tYA-uCi-YAk8FBSr6uSuefBhAcyKpY1IImFd_1qhVb6Ikr-KN7JU4jF9sTtAzVw2DNluDUlE0DvfxGTFD8OewHKzZCttn6KtZek9Lg25TpKdUqlGoxBvRL1WeD6Hj7P_n64mYWvBRu9XIKozwvv6Qd7PIeZr3wZcfXQ4IVVocytfgX1hFQD-5gVnRnt5cxOv0r26rFqydq0k0_rhlCunt6J9Ymu8Har9EIaWEgy3-PU0YGpjWlt1-XkSO904fKnnXsE6VscWbCCZTKU7bIfC7c3c%3D)

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5928f5bfbcc94d8aa3c4112340df0051&_e=KyuMWctJ8yc0WTp9rO6m90QHnUOpZFoD6vZ4gVpPBwUL78iQy89AhqDfay7h7PmWLuXL6WBdOeHyI6YQeH0tYA-uCi-YAk8FBSr6uSuefBhAcyKpY1IImFd_1qhVb6Ikr-KN7JU4jF9sTtAzVw2DNluDUlE0DvfxGTFD8OewHKzZCttn6KtZek9Lg25TpKdUEQpfbPh0PebudMQsr3FFwN8oDB3sPGTl_0sS_YIIz7rh2Peg1A0mAl-mLyN0iTjUm0cW6OSZj9NPaviHTxR7DwPHJUysQTzkKPMIDnvuHPMy1NAK5W0w4ozO8WqcuIKdTtdfBrE3lbhGqphK9YLGYo_KkqCYiP_S0GtYrv6Ne4Q%3D)

name: Team Jayapal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, today, our team is setting our mid-month fundraising goal: $20,000 raised before this Thursday, December 15.
**Here’s why it’s so important:** Pramila relies on grassroots donations to fund her work. She doesn’t take a cent of corporate PAC money because she works for the people, not corporate interests.
That’s why we’re so proud that our average donation is just $14.06. Pramila gets the kind of support from regular folks that makes a $14.06 average contribution possible. She’s not taking massive checks from Big Pharma lobbyists and Wall Street PACs like so many other politicians in DC.
[**We ran the numbers and we can hit our goal before Thursday if just 6 people from your zip code chip in $14.06 (or even $5). Can you donate right now and help us catch up on our fundraising for the quarter?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25227?refcode=em20221213-1952&t=1&akid=1952%2E420207%2ET1FhcW)
Pramila is leading on so many critical pieces of legislation and advocating for critical support to the American people. She’s a champion for working people — working people who haven’t gotten the support they need during the pandemic, during the last administration, and really, for decades.
For far too long, corporate profits have trumped the needs of regular people in our country. Big money in politics has led to more wealth inequality, more social injustice, and more profiteering. It’s clear that we need a movement to overcome the many injustices that people in this country have faced over decades.
[**Pramila is counting on you to chip in from your zip code to help grow this movement and fuel her urgent work. Can we count on you to give $14.06?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25227?refcode=em20221213-1952&t=2&akid=1952%2E420207%2ET1FhcW)
**[Contribute $14.06](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25227?refcode=em20221213-1952&t=21&akid=1952%2E420207%2ET1FhcW)**
2022 proved that our progressive movement is growing — and we’re only just getting started!
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221213-1952-footer&t=22&refcode2=1952_420207_T1FhcW&akid=1952%2E420207%2ET1FhcW)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Jan 6th Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: NEW: Jan 6th Committee Update
body:
Justice Thomas’ crystal-clear conflict of interest jeopardizes any attempt to hold those responsible accountable for the Jan 6th attack. | | |
---
| | Justice Clarence Thomas is facing calls for his recusal on any cases involving the 2020 election and the January 6th insurrection. Here’s why:
* It was reported that his wife, right-wing activist Ginni Thomas, made _several_ attempts to interfere with the results of the 2020 election – **directly contacting Trump’s Chief of Staff Mark Meadows and lawmakers in key states!**
* Justice Thomas **dissented** from a Supreme Court ruling forcing the Arizona GOP chair to turn over her phone records to the Jan 6th Committee.
* And leaked emails from Trump’s lawyers revealed that Trump’s team saw **Justice Thomas as their “only chance”** to get a favorable judicial decision before Jan 6th.

Justice Thomas’ crystal-clear conflict of interest could jeopardize any attempt to hold those responsible accountable for the Jan 6th attack. **That’s why we’re asking local Democrats for their input on whether Justice Thomas should recuse himself.** [_**Let us know what you think:**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0oQKCOhIvFUpduf6c5nVvFhQzmD2C-_JvlKs0W_HmR2Ks63En4teA6NOdwXWjIoBZJ-ZydXs0hTtpM-XfPjLzCOmTt0KNfu5SYB36ORS4uOw1PfzcjR24Y5EQqvd8qkfnBGM7uDHEt9CKa1J22zKVXb2ehesLSi0BmO0EdnCIcrOOc-OjbaE7zNBV7wsxNVTrd2mEL3kRD2qa4rxrZ0lEjd-6ZLooPDXD_rmF3GFisc1NJjbpUDsV5xRPXpY9S38GkwCGVR4Q3GXNXVIaqUB5HeVc3lZKllMXqmQ7V5duAxA-HMOh2N3X0b9cNH6U73ubkL5tcKfZ0YPemDqkkxPLl80VQNGZTSPQddt0sEJWtDv/3ry/KSX87Zj0TUazb2iFQVTHuQ/h0/AVETa9YkR0h6Nib5i3oIWasGsNFFkthr6e_GqFkwDXc) | **Should Justice Thomas recuse himself from cases involving the 2020 election and Jan 6th Insurrection?**

clean_body: Justice Thomas’ crystal-clear conflict of interest jeopardizes any attempt to hold those responsible accountable for the Jan 6th attack. | | | | | Justice Clarence Thomas is facing calls for his recusal on any cases involving the 2020 election and the January 6th insurrection. Here’s why: It was reported that his wife, right-wing activist Ginni Thomas, made several attempts to interfere with the results of the 2020 election – directly contacting Trump’s Chief of Staff Mark Meadows and lawmakers in key states! Justice Thomas dissented from a Supreme Court ruling forcing the Arizona GOP chair to turn over her phone records to the Jan 6th Committee. And leaked emails from Trump’s lawyers revealed that Trump’s team saw Justice Thomas as their “only chance” to get a favorable judicial decision before Jan 6th. Justice Thomas’ crystal-clear conflict of interest could jeopardize any attempt to hold those responsible accountable for the Jan 6th attack. That’s why we’re asking local Democrats for their input on whether Justice Thomas should recuse himself. | Should Justice Thomas recuse himself from cases involving the 2020 election and Jan 6th Insurrection? name: Stop Trump via Fight for Progress
subject: Stop Trump via Fight for Progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:

clean_body: | | = Folks, the special election to fill Jen Kiggans’ state senate seat is just a few weeks away, so we need to go all in to elect my friend, Democrat Aaron Rouse. = | | | = I started the Defense Dem PAC to help elect compassionate, principled Democrats up and down the ballot here in Virginia. Aaron Rouse lives those values every day. He’s an award-winning community leader, nonprofit founder, city councilman, and a tireless advocate for Virginia families. I'm honored to call Aaron a friend, and truly proud to endorse him in this race. He’s exactly the type of proactive leader we need right now. But with Republicans fighting tooth and nail to hold this seat, he needs our urgent support. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Gratefully, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: An urgent call to action on Yemen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we urgently
need your help:

The White House is urging Senators to vote against Bernie Sanders’ Yemen
War Power Resolution.

The vote is tonight so we need you to take a few moments of your time
today to call your Senators and demand that they ‘vote yes’ on Senator
Bernie Sanders’ Yemen War Power Resolution.

Please call (202) 224-3121 today to urge your Senators to vote in support
of the Yemen War Powers Resolution.

It's past time to end American military aid that supports the horrific
Saudi-led war in Yemen and Senator Sanders’ resolution would do exactly
that. Your voice matters and we need to flood the Senate with thousands of
calls before the vote tonight.

Please call (202) 224-3121 today to demand that your Senators votes YES in
support of the Yemen War Powers Resolution.

Thank you for doing your part,

Team JD

PS: [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123121?refcode=em20221213-26536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26536%2E1203867%2EzqOu88 ]We rely on grassroots contributions to transform the Democratic
Party from the inside out. Please consider making a donation today.

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1002&akid=26536%2E1203867%2EzqOu88 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1003&akid=26536%2E1203867%2EzqOu88 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221213-26536-footer&t=1004&refcode2=26536_1203867_zqOu88&akid=26536%2E1203867%2EzqOu88

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=26536%2E1203867%2EzqOu88

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

name: Katie Porter
subject: Using the power we have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
I was told to wait my turn and play by the rules.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15549%2E3422442%2E62zgXm)
Derek,
When I first was elected to Congress in 2018, I was eager to jump right into delivering for voters—addressing the high cost of things like healthcare, standing up to the gun lobby, and addressing climate change. But **I was quickly told I needed to wait my turn and play by the rules.**
I wasn’t going to let ‘the way things were done’ stop me from delivering for my constituents. I quickly realized that I had real power in congressional hearings, where Members of Congress have the opportunity to ask direct questions to witnesses and extract information.
It’s not just about getting a sound bite or ‘going viral.’ Those few minutes allow me to draw attention to issues Americans are facing, reveal the incompetence of some Trump Administration officials, **and even secure free COVID tests for all Americans at the very start of the pandemic.**
Congressional hearings are sometimes treated as these perfunctory things (I mean, how many people are watching C-SPAN), but they’re really such an opportunity for Members of Congress to hear from experts, hold those with power accountable, and **learn valuable information that helps us create and push forward real policy.** Aside from creating laws, **Congress has a duty to oversee the government and how taxpayer dollars are spent** —and hearings are a key part of that.
Prior to being in Congress I was a professor, so**using a whiteboard to break things down during these hearings came naturally to me**. And as a parent, I’ve had my share of practice questioning people. I can promise you my kids are tougher witnesses than people like Ben Carson.
I’m proud to be standing up to special interests and holding power to account—that’s my job. Thanks for being in this fight with me.
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE13_HEA_20221213_V1_F&t=2&akid=15549%2E3422442%2E62zgXm)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15549%2E3422442%2E62zgXm)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15549%2E3422442%2E62zgXm).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

The records show NIAID officials were concerned about “gain-of-function” research in China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology in 2016. The Fauci agency was also concerned about EcoHealth Alliance’s lack of compliance with reporting rules and use of gain-of-function research in the NIH-funded research involving bat coronaviruses in Wuhan, China. Musk tweeted that his pronouns are “prosecute/Fauci.” [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [=] 2021-12-07 Fauci Agency COVID Records Reveal Information about NIH Research into the Coronavirus [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] “These FOIA documents show that Fauci’s agency has been hiding information on China’s failure to provide essential data on COVID-19,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The slow-rolling and stonewalling by Fauci’s agency on China, gain of function, and its COVID response generally is pure obstruction.” [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x2] [] 2022-12-12 NIH Records Reveal FBI Inquiry of Wuhan Grant Showing Fauci Agency ‘Gain-of-Function’ Concerns about Wuhan Lab [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The records show NIAID officials were concerned about “gain-of-function” research in China’s Wuhan Institute of Virology in 2016. The Fauci agency was also concerned about EcoHealth Alliance’s lack of compliance with reporting rules and use of gain-of-function research in the NIH-funded research involving bat coronaviruses in Wuhan, China. Team, if you want to understand how your grassroots support for the NDRC helped reshape the midterm elections, you just need to look at two charts. **This first chart shows the outcome of North Carolina’s House races in 2020 – under the state’s old, gerrymandered congressional map.** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55927803/383272080/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221213.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Yjc5MTFkLTI5N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uwWIHjbb1KyLYcP7zv51aWkDeGT2PAXWgoRCqHftUpQ=)**
---
**And this second chart shows the outcome of North Carolina’s House races in 2022 – _after the NDRC’s strategy helped secure fair districts._**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55927804/383272081/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221213.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Yjc5MTFkLTI5N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uwWIHjbb1KyLYcP7zv51aWkDeGT2PAXWgoRCqHftUpQ=)**
---
[**_Help the NDRC continue fighting for fair maps across the country >>>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55927805/383272082/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221213.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Yjc5MTFkLTI5N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uwWIHjbb1KyLYcP7zv51aWkDeGT2PAXWgoRCqHftUpQ=)
**Team, the NDRC’s strategy of going state-by-state to secure fair maps _works_ – and these charts help prove it.**

In North Carolina, Democrats won three more seats under new, fair maps than they did under gerrymandered maps. Considering that control of the House of Representatives was decided by just a handful of seats, that kind of margin in a single state could make or break Democrats’ future chances of winning back the majority.

**As Attorney General Eric Holder put it, we helped prove that “ wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” That means if we continue fighting for fair maps in every state, then we can help ensure Democrats can _win_ in every state.**

We must keep fighting, team. Republicans have made it clear that they no longer view redistricting as a once-in-a-decade event – instead, they intend to continue manipulating the maps. That means the NDRC needs your continued support to fight back.

[**_So please: Will you pitch in today to help the NDRC continue implementing our proven, democracy-saving strategy in states all across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55927806/383272083/-1417996814?amount=30&refcode=20221213.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5Yjc5MTFkLTI5N2ItZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uwWIHjbb1KyLYcP7zv51aWkDeGT2PAXWgoRCqHftUpQ=)

clean_body: we can see our strategy in action | Team, if you want to understand how your grassroots support for the NDRC helped reshape the midterm elections, you just need to look at two charts. This first chart shows the outcome of North Carolina’s House races in 2020 – under the state’s old, gerrymandered congressional map. | = And this second chart shows the outcome of North Carolina’s House races in 2022 – after the NDRC’s strategy helped secure fair districts. = = Team, the NDRC’s strategy of going state-by-state to secure fair maps works – and these charts help prove it. In North Carolina, Democrats won three more seats under new, fair maps than they did under gerrymandered maps. Considering that control of the House of Representatives was decided by just a handful of seats, that kind of margin in a single state could make or break Democrats’ future chances of winning back the majority. As Attorney General Eric Holder put it, we helped prove that “ wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” That means if we continue fighting for fair maps in every state, then we can help ensure Democrats can win in every state. We must keep fighting, team. Republicans have made it clear that they no longer view redistricting as a once-in-a-decade event – instead, they intend to continue manipulating the maps. That means the NDRC needs your continued support to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. | | | Peter, In the years since Joe Biden got to the Oval Office, the America-first agenda has taken a back seat.

**_That ends now._**

In the new year, it’s time to bring the America-first spirit back like never before - but we need your help.

**The FINAL mid-month deadline of 2022 is just TWO DAYS away, and this is our LAST chance to build our war chest before the new year.**

_If you’re ready to FIGHT for America, we can’t have you back down now._

clean_body: | | | Peter, In the years since Joe Biden got to the Oval Office, the America-first agenda has taken a back seat. That ends now. In the new year, it’s time to bring the America-first spirit back like never before - but we need your help. The FINAL mid-month deadline of 2022 is just TWO DAYS away, and this is our LAST chance to build our war chest before the new year. If you’re ready to FIGHT for America, we can’t have you back down now. American greatness doesn’t come without hard work, Peter. And Republican leaders are ready to put the pedal to the metal for the American people to STOP the radical Left. But with the Democrats pulling out all the stops, our patriots need all the help they can get. Thank you, American Patriot Project | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

We’re so grateful for Joe Biden and Democratic leaders who made this law a reality, which is why we're calling on _**thousands**_ of Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign our **MASSIVE** thank you card**\-- but we're missing your signature!**

[**Please, before the midnight deadline: Click here to thank President Biden and Democratic leaders for their efforts to fight for _all_ Americans >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11394?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221213-SigntheCard-RFMAPostSigning-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221213-SigntheCard-RFMAPostSigning-Pros-sl1&akid=9180%2E9716520%2ErYPu6O)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I *really* care what you think, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Will you take one minute or less to share your thoughts on what issues I should focus on in the Senate?
#
Like I’ve always said, Derek...
While my name may have been the one on the ticket, our campaign would be about YOU 😁
And now that you’ve helped send me to the Senate, it’s time to pivot to legislating for YOU 😁
That's a commitment that my team and I take *super* seriously, which is why as we pack up to head to D.C., I wanted to pause for a sec to get your thoughts on what our priorities should be.
**[Will you take one minute (or less) to share your thoughts on what issues you want me to prioritize as a Senator? I really want our work to be guided by yinz.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022/?source=em20221213-8165&t=1&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)**
**[TAKE OUR SURVEY »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022/?source=em20221213-8165&t=2&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)**
I’ve never shied away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing our Commonwealth, and I plan on continuing to fight for working folks and families.
We're in this together, Derek, so I hope you'll take a moment to take our survey:
**[Can you do me a solid + share your thoughts via our priorities survey? I want to make sure my legislative priorities align with the biggest challenges you’re facing day-to-day.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-2022/?source=em20221213-8165&t=3&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your continued support means so much to me + the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator-Elect

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221213-8165-footer&t=4&refcode2=8165_434096_zIZl3Z&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8165%2E434096%2EzIZl3Z)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Now that election season is OFFICIALLY over, I want to thank you for all of your hard work that you’ve done this year. Our conservative movement would be NOTHING without you on our team, Peter. Now, it’s up to us to start the new year strong, and I’m counting on you to keep up the momentum. | | Senate Republicans can’t do this alone, Peter. | Happy birthday to the National Guard! Today we celebrate the 375th birthday of this vital branch of the United States Armed Forces.

Throughout its history, the National Guard has played a crucial role in protecting our country and our communities. From defending our shores during times of war, to providing disaster relief and security during times of crisis, the men and women of the National Guard have always been ready to serve.

On this special day, let's take a moment to thank the brave men and women of the National Guard for their service and dedication. Happy birthday!
-Lori Chavez-DeRemer

Democrats in the House and Senate were not going to wait around for the Trump-packed Court to destroy marriage equality like they did the right to choose. They took urgent and necessary action to guarantee federal protection for the right to marry for all by passing the _Respect for Marriage Act._

And today, President Biden signed it into law.

**THIS is why elections matter. When we elect great leaders, we can pass important legislation like this.**

| Team,

Arizona voters soundly rejected the AZ GOP’s statewide slate of election liars this November. But rather than listen to voters, the AZ GOP is doubling down on their lies.

**They’ve promoted far-right extremist Wendy Rogers to chair the State Senate election committee – a clear sign they aren’t changing course anytime soon.**

While Governor-elect Hobbs is trying to focus on Arizona’s real issues, we know Rogers and her far-right crew will send tons of voter suppression bills to Hobbs’ desk.

**[Team, it’s clear we’re going to have to continue to fight voter suppression due to election lies here in Arizona. Can you donate $5 right now so we have the resources to fight back at every level when the time comes?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yKrdt-UYYGboqbrJaQEUA2TjJxVKj-fIK0ILGNqO4YNm8YLspJWqb6j_z4pwYwOBHjhSKEiBg82FPlh9OW3opWVLA5YBY9Rt8GRKHQa9ccMo7DIP65Ff8vTFPjMMra3Bh3znsBX9qxbSbFfvzQnaMcs5PMOdE7rHcqhqM5RLFw5Vs4rBnHstw8_BmHWzYV5dby1m8Rc90T3owWeX8IHI2nK3KKw5Bd49coBUswuIS2bo83TcGrHQh7j-t5TEjz4GLCzvjeXuwE17_j7_OqxWd_e6wdjCNUiyhCJ7Nvh9os11YaRlssoJDQVLMkDhmoG4LZg625KqFMB6PA_RpOsGNh2r8C_2yR1mIlA3XG6hX2CAYaZSPO6xAaKp1Mxb-l_xrNhlQE6RioOTCh06UydLaXGO3mnLB063xRbfx-NIGZyjqkvSyii2DF6evHnrzBrxEqoM4He9z_BpYywIREWWx7/3ry/ybHzVaeWTE2wMn9yTP7e3g/h1/qrYmRaWZeaUvlf4wuWI25EGi8p3vu0KLooRiONWSs_4)** [

The AZ GOP has desperately tried everything they can since it became clear voters rejected their viewpoints this November.

They’ve filed lawsuits and tried to ruin the election certification process. They even sued in court to try to overturn the result in the Arizona Attorney General’s race.

Instead of taking their losses and refocusing, they are letting an extremist like Wendy Rogers control their legislative agenda when it comes to elections as one more desperate attempt.

**Wendy Rogers shouldn’t be in charge of anything, much less legislation about our elections. Which means the fight over election lies in Arizona is far from over.**

**[Team, we have to continue to fight these election deniers who can’t accept our democratic election outcomes until this stops completely. clean_body: | | | The fight over election lies in AZ continues | | | Team, Arizona voters soundly rejected the AZ GOP’s statewide slate of election liars this November. But rather than listen to voters, the AZ GOP is doubling down on their lies. They’ve promoted far-right extremist Wendy Rogers to chair the State Senate election committee – a clear sign they aren’t changing course anytime soon. While Governor-elect Hobbs is trying to focus on Arizona’s real issues, we know Rogers and her far-right crew will send tons of voter suppression bills to Hobbs’ desk. The AZ GOP has desperately tried everything they can since it became clear voters rejected their viewpoints this November. They’ve filed lawsuits and tried to ruin the election certification process. They even sued in court to try to overturn the result in the Arizona Attorney General’s race. Instead of taking their losses and refocusing, they are letting an extremist like Wendy Rogers control their legislative agenda when it comes to elections as one more desperate attempt. Wendy Rogers shouldn’t be in charge of anything, much less legislation about our elections. Which means the fight over election lies in Arizona is far from over. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We won’t stop fighting for democracy, AZ Dems Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Respect for Marriage Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Today, President Biden signed the Respect for Marriage Act, which officially codifies marriage equality for LGBTQ+ and interracial couples into federal law.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw)
Derek,
Today, President Biden signed the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , which officially codifies marriage equality for LGBTQ+ and interracial couples into federal law.
This is a major victory. For civil rights. For equality. For the right of two human beings to love each other and obtain legal recognition of their bond of marriage, while guaranteeing that right cannot be subverted by partisan political actors on the Supreme Court.
**[Add your name to join me as an honorary citizen cosponsor and celebrate President Biden signing the _Respect for Marriage Act_ into law.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221213-respect-for-marriage-vsp/.EmuJMf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221213_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221213-respect-for-marriage-vsp/.EmuJMf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221213_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw)
---
Following the Supreme Court’s devastating _Dobbs_ ruling that struck down _Roe v. Wade_ and the constitutional right to an abortion, conservative Justice Clarence Thomas intimated that the _Obergefell v. Hodges_ decision guaranteeing marriage equality could be their next target.
Republican Senator Mike Braun of Indiana bizarrely suggested that _Loving v. Virginia_ , which permitted interracial marriages, could also be unconstitutional.
**This Democratic Congress has taken decisive action.** It is difficult to fathom how it is even necessary in 2022, yet Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell’s actions stacking the Court with far-right ideologues made it necessary. So we have acted, and today I’m asking you to join us:
**[Derek, join us in celebrating this historic legislation by signing on as a citizen cosponsor of the _Respect for Marriage Act_.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221213-respect-for-marriage-vsp/.EmuJMf&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221213_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw)**
I am proud to cosponsor this legislation. It means so much to so many, and it’s moments like these that remind me of why I serve.
Gratefully,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1444%2E5257348%2EH0DoUw)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
